AI.conclusion: 这些缺陷由金刚石自身的碳间隙原子内在形成，无需氮元素参与，提供了一条无氮途径（补充了Ia型金刚石中氮介导的机制），并为辐照诱导位错环提供了可推广的理论框架。

title: Surviving the Attack of the Clones
summary: We consider a population dynamics model in which each diffusing particle that hits a catalytic surface can split into two independent copies (clones). The particles of such a growing-in-size population search in parallel for a hidden partially reactive target to trigger a reaction event (e.g., a viral attack). We investigate the statistics of the fastest first-reaction time (FRT) among all the particles. We establish a nonlinear integral equation for the survival probability and then analyze the associated probability density of the FRT and its moments. Lower and upper bounds on the mean FRT are then deduced in terms of the system parameters (target reactivity, catalytic rate, diffusivity, etc.). Because autocatalytic replication can rapidly increase the number of searchers, it can substantially accelerate the diffusive search. We solve the nonlinear equations numerically in a basic geometric setting and reveal advantages and limitations on the autocatalytic search.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了一种自催化复制扩散模型，其中粒子在催化表面碰撞后可分裂为两个独立副本，并行搜索以触发隐藏目标反应。通过建立非线性积分方程分析最快首次反应时间（FRT）的统计特性，推导了平均FRT的上下界，并数值求解揭示了自催化搜索的优势与局限性。
AI.motivation: 自然界中（如病毒攻击）常出现粒子数量动态增长的并行搜索场景，传统固定粒子数模型无法描述自催化复制对搜索加速的影响，亟需建立理论框架分析这类系统的首次反应时间统计规律。
AI.method: 建立生存概率的非线性积分方程，分析最快首次反应时间的概率密度和矩；推导平均FRT关于系统参数（目标反应性、催化速率、扩散系数等）的上下界；在基本几何设定下数值求解非线性方程。
AI.result: 自催化复制能通过快速增加搜索者数量显著加速扩散搜索；推导了平均FRT的解析界限；数值结果揭示了自催化搜索在不同参数条件下的优势（加速）与局限性（如非线性增长带来的边际效应）。
AI.conclusion: 自催化复制是加速扩散搜索的有效机制，但受限于系统参数（如催化速率和目标反应性）的权衡；非线性积分方程框架为理解此类增长型并行搜索系统提供了理论工具。

title: Multi-level π-junction in a proximitized Ge/SiGe quantum dot probed by an on-chip superconducting microwave resonator
summary: Using on-chip microwave measurements, we investigate multilevel $π$-junctions formed by proximitized quantum dot (QD) in a germanium (Ge)/silicon-germanium (SiGe) heterostructure. In the multilevel regime, where several QD orbitals contribute simultaneously to superconducting transport, the Josephson ground state is no longer determined solely by the occupation of a single orbital. By combining DC transport and microwave techniques, we identify the qualitative signatures of multilevel $π$-junctions in both their gate-voltage dependence and microwave response. In particular, we observe combinations phase transitions that are sharp or smooth in gate voltage and which exhibit distinct inductive and dissipative signatures. Such multilevel Josephson transport has previously been observed primarily in exceptionally clean systems such as carbon nanotubes. Our results establish proximitized Ge as a platform for investigating hybrid superconductor/semiconductor physics and demonstrate the integration of gate-defined superconducting quantum devices with high-quality on-chip microwave resonators.

AI.tldr: 本文利用片上微波测量技术，研究了锗/硅锗异质结构中近向量子点多能级π结，通过直流输运和微波技术结合，识别了多能级π结的栅压依赖性和微波响应特征，证实了Ge作为研究超导/半导体混合物理的平台潜力。
AI.motivation: 现有超导/半导体混合系统中，多能级约瑟夫森输运主要局限于碳纳米管等超洁净系统，缺乏在锗基量子点平台上的系统研究。
AI.method: 采用片上微波测量技术，结合直流输运和微波方法，研究Ge/SiGe异质结构中近向量子点的多能级π结行为，分析栅压依赖性和微波响应特征。
AI.result: 观察到多能级π结在栅压扫描中呈现尖锐和平滑两种相变，并展现出独特的电感和耗散信号特征。
AI.conclusion: 证明近化锗系统是研究混合超导/半导体物理的有效平台，展示了栅定义超导量子器件与高质量片上微波谐振器的集成可行性。

title: Reply to Comment on "Scaling and universality at noisy quench dynamical quantum phase transitions"
summary: The Comment by J. Sirker [arXiv:2511.16509] raises an important issue concerning dynamical quantum phase transitions (DQPTs) in noisy and mixed-state dynamics, namely that the extension of the Loschmidt echo from pure to mixed states is not unique and different extensions preserve different physical properties. The Comment examines a noise-averaged mixed-state fidelity and shows that DQPTs cannot occur for any nonzero noise when the return rate is defined through the Uhlmann-Bures fidelity of the noise-averaged density matrix. This conclusion is valid for the mixed-state fidelity observable discussed in the Comment and is consistent with prior studies [https://doi.org/10.1103/PhysRevB.109.L180303, arXiv:2504.03005]. Our article [https://doi.org/10.1103/mkll-nd46] investigated a different operationally defined quantity: the logarithm of the Loschmidt echo obtained by first determining the noise-averaged excitation probabilities generated during the noisy ramp and then performing a coherent post-ramp evolution of a pure state constructed from these noise-averaged transition probabilities. As emphasized explicitly in our original publication, this observable is defined through an operational assumption and is not the same quantity as the mixed-state fidelity. The nonanalyticities reported in Ref. [https://doi.org/10.1103/mkll-nd46] therefore concern this two-stage operational protocol and should not be identified with zeros of the Uhlmann-Bures fidelity. There is therefore no direct contradiction between the theorem established for the Uhlmann-Bures return rate and the conclusions obtained for the different operational protocol studied in Ref. [https://doi.org/10.1103/mkll-nd46].

AI.tldr: 本文是一篇对评论的回应，澄清了关于噪声混合态动力学中动力学量子相变（DQPT）的争议：评论中基于Uhlmann-Bures保真度证明有噪声时DQPT不会出现，而原论文研究的是一个不同的操作量（基于噪声平均跃迁概率的两阶段协议），两者并不矛盾。
AI.motivation: 回应对原始论文的评论，澄清两个研究使用的是不同的物理量定义，消除误解，维护原结论的合理性。
AI.method: 对比分析两种不同的物理量定义：1）评论中使用的Uhlmann-Bures保真度（基于噪声平均密度矩阵），2）原论文中定义的操作量（先对噪声平均跃迁概率，再进行纯态相干演化）。
AI.result: 两个研究之间不存在直接矛盾：评论的结论适用于Uhlmann-Bures保真度，原论文的非解析行为源于不同的操作协议。
AI.conclusion: 混合态DQPT的定义不唯一，不同扩展方式保留不同物理性质，研究者需明确所用量子的物理意义。

title: Unconventional Superconductivity in the Chiral Topological Semimetal Ag2Pd3S
summary: Chiral crystals provide a unique setting where broken inversion symmetry, strong spin-orbit coupling, and electronic topology intertwine, yet superconductivity in intrinsically chiral materials remains rare. Here, we report unconventional superconductivity in the chiral topological semimetal Ag$_2$Pd$_3$S, an enantiomorphic analog of natural mineral coldwellite, crystallizing in the right-handed space group $P4_132$. Bulk superconductivity with a transition temperature $T_C = 1.1(2)$ K is confirmed by electrical resistivity, magnetization, and specific-heat measurements. Muon spin rotation and relaxation ($μ$SR) experiments reveal a fully gapped superconducting state that spontaneously time-reversal symmetry (TRS) breaking establishing Ag$_2$Pd$_3$S as the first chiral topological semimetal superconductor exhibiting intrinsic TRS breaking. First-principles calculations uncover multiple multifold band crossings near the Fermi level, hosting Kramers-Weyl, double spin-1, and spin-3/2 quasiparticles with large topological charges. These unconventional fermions generate symmetry-protected topological surface states and underscore the nontrivial topology of the normal state. Symmetry analysis based on the Ginzburg-Landau theory suggests a loop-supercurrent-ordered superconducting state, yielding a full gap alongside spontaneous TRS breaking. The coexistence of TRS-breaking superconductivity and chiral multifold fermions identifies Ag$_2$Pd$_3$S as a platform for realizing intrinsic superconducting diode effects and chirality-induced spin selectivity, offering a transformative pathway toward dissipationless topological quantum technologies.

AI.tldr: 本文报道了手性拓扑半金属Ag₂Pd₃S中非常规超导电性的发现，该材料是首个同时具备本征时间反演对称性破缺和手性多重费米子的超导体，为拓扑量子技术提供了新平台。
AI.motivation: 手性晶体中反演对称性破缺、强自旋-轨道耦合与电子拓扑结构交织，但内禀手性材料中的超导现象极为罕见，探索此类材料具有重要意义。
AI.method: 通过电阻率、磁化率和比热测量确认体超导电性；利用μ子自旋旋转与弛豫实验探测超导态的时间反演对称性破缺；结合第一性原理计算分析电子能带结构和拓扑性质；基于Ginzburg-Landau理论进行对称性分析。
AI.result: Ag₂Pd₃S在1.1 K以下进入体超导态，具有完全能隙且自发破缺时间反演对称性；能带中存在Kramers-Weyl、双自旋-1和自旋-3/2等多种高拓扑荷准粒子；理论分析表明其超导序参量为环超流有序态。
AI.conclusion: Ag₂Pd₃S是首个同时具有手性拓扑半金属特性与本征时间反演对称性破缺的超导体，为实现超导二极管效应和手性诱导自旋选择性等拓扑量子技术提供了可行途径。

title: Selenium direct doping obtained high-performance-n-type Bi2Te3-based thermoelectric materials with a wide temperature range
summary: The article reports on a series of n-type Bi2Te3-based thermoelectric materials prepared via a high-temperature melting combined with annealing process. The effects of Se doping content and annealing process on the carrier concentration, suppression of the bipolar effect, and thermoelectric performance of the materials were systematically investigated. The experimental results provide valuable reference for researchers in this field.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了通过高温熔融结合退火工艺制备的n型Bi2Te3基热电材料，系统探讨了Se掺杂含量和退火工艺对载流子浓度、双极效应抑制及热电性能的影响，为相关领域研究人员提供了有价值的参考。
AI.motivation: 优化n型Bi2Te3基热电材料的性能，通过Se掺杂和退火工艺调控载流子浓度并抑制双极效应，以提升热电转换效率。
AI.method: 采用高温熔融结合退火工艺制备n型Bi2Te3基热电材料，系统研究Se掺杂含量和退火工艺参数对材料性能的影响。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，Se掺杂和退火工艺能有效调控载流子浓度并抑制双极效应，从而优化热电性能。
AI.conclusion: Se掺杂含量和退火工艺对n型Bi2Te3基热电材料的性能具有显著影响，研究结果可为该领域提供有价值的参考。

title: Nonequilibrium electron-phonon dynamics with high momentum resolution: Thermalization bottlenecks and the effects of phonon dispersion
summary: The nonequilibrium electron-phonon interplay is central to thermalization of solids, yet the microscopic picture of transient states and relaxation pathways remains incomplete. Previous nonequilibrium Green's function (NEGF) studies were restricted to local phonons and local self-energy approximations, leaving momentum-dependent dynamics largely unexplored. In this work, we demonstrate the power of the recently developed quantics-tensor-train (QTT) NEGF framework through large-scale lattice simulations with arbitrary phonon dispersions. QTTs provide a memory-efficient representation of two-time Green's functions, enabling momentum-resolved simulations with full electron-phonon feedback on lattices up to 256x256 sites. Comparing optical and acoustic phonon models, we reveal a hierarchy of relaxation bottlenecks that extends the well-known phonon-window bottleneck effect. For optical phonons, we confirm the main phonon-energy window and uncover a reduced window separating momentum-space regions of excess and deficit electronic population. We also identify a separate bottleneck in phonon thermalization, rooted in the momentum-dependent coupling to the particle-hole continuum. For acoustic phonons, the phonon-energy window acquires pronounced momentum dependence dictated by simultaneous energy-momentum conservation. The reduced window becomes asymmetric; directional scattering between Brillouin-zone regions creates a persistent bottleneck for low-momentum phonon modes. The high momentum and frequency resolution of our spectra further reveals a direct correspondence between phonon relaxation and charge response. Our results establish QTT-NEGF simulations as a scalable and controlled framework for quantitative nonequilibrium electron-phonon dynamics, overcoming previous lattice-size and propagation-time limitations and providing accurate reference data for time-resolved spectroscopies.

AI.tldr: 本文利用量子张量列车(QTT)非平衡格林函数(NEGF)框架，首次实现了具有任意声子色散的大规模晶格模拟(最高256x256格点)，揭示了光频和声频声子弛豫瓶颈的层次结构，包括声子能量窗口、动量空间缩减窗口以及声子热化瓶颈等新机制。
AI.motivation: 传统的非平衡格林函数研究局限于局域声子和局域自能近似，无法探索动量依赖的电子-声子动力学的微观图像，对瞬态态和弛豫路径的理解尚不完整。
AI.method: 采用近期发展的量子张量列车(QTT)技术对非平衡格林函数进行高效表示，实现对双时格林函数的内存高效存储，从而能够进行大规模格点模拟(最高256x256)，并支持全电子-声子反馈的动量分辨计算。
AI.result: 揭示了弛豫瓶颈的层次结构：对光频声子，确认了声子能量窗口效应并发现了动量空间中电子布居过剩与亏损区域间的缩减窗口；对声频声子，发现了动量依赖的性能量窗口和非对称缩减窗口，低动量声子模式存在持续瓶颈。同时建立了声子弛豫与电荷响应的直接对应关系。
AI.conclusion: QTT-NEGF框架是一种可扩展、可控的定量非平衡电子-声子动力学模拟方法，克服了以往晶格尺寸和传播时间的限制，为时间分辨光谱学提供了准确的参考数据。

title: NQS-Agent: Health-Aware Agentic Hyperparameter Optimization for Neural-Network Quantum States
summary: Neural-network quantum states (NQS) provide expressive variational representations for strongly correlated quantum many-body systems, but their practical accuracy depends sensitively on architecture-level hyperparameters and optimization schedules. Here we develop NQS-Agent, an implemented open-source software framework for health-aware hyperparameter optimization (HPO) in NQS calculations. Its workflow monitors energy trajectories, detects destructive optimization events, stops unstable calculations, modifies the learning-rate schedule, resumes optimization from safe checkpoints, and ranks candidates with an anomaly-aware score. We demonstrate the approach on a residual convolutional NQS for the square-lattice Heisenberg $J_1$-$J_2$ model, using architectures with parameter counts comparable to aCNN, a convolutional NQS architecture used here as a reference. The results show that NQS-Agent improves over the reported human-tuned aCNN baseline for the aCNN reference architecture and identifies a structurally distinct wide-and-shallow competitive candidate within the parameter-count-matched residual-CNN search space. These results show that the stability and recovery history of an optimization trajectory should be considered when assessing an NQS result. Health-aware HPO therefore provides a reproducible tuning protocol that goes beyond selecting a single lowest-energy calculation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了NQS-Agent，一个用于神经量子态计算中健康感知超参数优化的开源框架，能够监测优化轨迹、检测破坏性事件并自动调整学习率，在J1-J2海森堡模型中优于人工调优的基线结果。
AI.motivation: 神经量子态(NQS)的精度高度依赖于架构级超参数和优化策略的人工选择，缺乏系统性的调优协议，导致结果不可靠且难以复现。
AI.method: 开发NQS-Agent框架，集成能量轨迹监控、破坏性优化事件检测、不稳定计算终止、学习率调度自动修改、安全检查点恢复以及异常感知评分排序等功能，实现健康感知的超参数优化(HPO)。
AI.result: 在方格子J1-J2海森堡模型的残差卷积NQS上，NQS-Agent超越了人工调优的aCNN基线，并在参数计数匹配的搜索空间中发现了结构独特的宽而浅竞争候选架构。
AI.conclusion: 优化轨迹的稳定性和恢复历史应作为评估NQS结果的考量因素，健康感知HPO提供了一种超越仅选择最低能量计算的可复现调优协议。

title: Spontaneous Symmetry Breaking and Emergent Helicity in Achiral D4h-Symmetric Zinc Phthalocyanine Condensates
comment: 5 pages, 3 figures, Supplemental material included with 5 pages and 11 figures
summary: Herein it is shown spontaneous symmetry breaking in supramolecular aggregates of D4h-symmetric zinc phthalocyanine (ZnPc). Ab initio density functional theory calculations at the M06/DGDZVP level reveal that intermolecular interactions induce a subtle relaxation of the macrocyclic framework, producing a characteristic red shift of the aza-bridge (C-N-C) stretching mode and symmetric stretching of the pyrrole ring. Confocal Raman Optical Activity measurements further reveal a negative Cotton effect at 1505 cm^-1 and 1338 cm^-1, providing evidence of emergent supramolecular chirality. Our findings identify pristine ZnPc as a model system for spontaneous self-assembled chiral symmetry breaking in molecular condensates and suggest new opportunities for chiroptical, spin-selective, and quantum functional materials.

AI.tldr: 本文报道了D4h对称的锌酞菁（ZnPc）超分子聚集体中自发对称性破缺现象，通过DFT计算和拉曼光学活性测量证实了分子间相互作用诱导的框架弛豫和超分子手性产生。
AI.motivation: 探索D4h对称的ZnPc分子是否能在超分子聚集体中发生自发对称性破缺产生手性，为理解分子凝聚体中的手性起源提供模型系统。
AI.method: 采用M06/DGDZVP水平的DFT计算分析分子间相互作用对框架弛豫的影响；使用共聚焦拉曼光学活性测量检测Cotton效应。
AI.result: DFT计算显示分子间相互作用诱导大环框架弛豫，产生氮杂桥（C-N-C）伸缩模式和吡咯环对称伸缩的红移；拉曼光学活性测量在1505 cm^-1和1338 cm^-1处观察到负Cotton效应，证实了超分子手性。
AI.conclusion: 纯ZnPc可作为自发自组装手性对称性破缺的模型系统，为手性光学、自旋选择和量子功能材料提供新机遇。

title: Inter-band coherence effects in disordered crystals: beyond the non-crossing approximation
summary: We develop a quantum kinetic theory for Bloch electrons driven by a uniform dc electric field, extending the nonequilibrium density-matrix formalism beyond the non-crossing approximation. This extension is required to capture steady-state terms that are nominally zeroth order in disorder strength and compete with intrinsic band-geometric responses, as in anomalous Hall and related spin, orbital, and valley transport. Working in the length gauge with Gaussian white-noise disorder, we include impurity scattering to fourth order in the disorder potential. An iterative solution for the impurity-induced density-matrix fluctuations yields a connected $V^4$ collision integral after subtracting disconnected impurity pairings, thereby avoiding double counting. The resulting terms separate into self-energy corrections, ladder-type vertex renormalization, and crossed quantum-interference contributions. We clarify the correspondence between this density-matrix kinetic equation and the Keldysh formalism, and decompose the response into Fermi-surface and Fermi-sea components. As an application, we study the two-dimensional massive Dirac fermion model. We obtain analytical expressions for the single-particle lifetime, transport relaxation time, and longitudinal conductivity at the Born level, and then evaluate the anomalous Hall conductivity including crossed impurity processes. These processes generate an extrinsic contribution of order $τ^0$ that coexists with the intrinsic Berry-curvature term; for Gaussian white-noise disorder in this model, the $Ψ$-type contribution cancels while the $X$-type term remains finite. The formalism provides a consistent route for incorporating band geometry and crossed-disorder corrections into multiband transport, with applications to spin, pseudospin, orbital, and valley phenomena.

AI.tldr: 本文发展了一种超越非交叉近似的量子动力学理论，用于描述均匀直流电场驱动的Bloch电子，通过包含四阶杂质散射（V⁴碰撞积分）并分离自能修正、梯型顶点重正化和交叉量子干涉贡献，澄清了与Keldysh形式论的对应关系。在二维大质量狄拉克费米子模型中，解析计算了单粒子寿命、输运弛豫时间和纵向电导率，发现交叉杂质过程产生与固有贝里曲率项共存的τ⁰阶外禀反常霍尔电导，其中Ψ型贡献抵消而X型贡献有限。
AI.motivation: 传统非交叉近似（NCA）无法捕获零阶于无序强度的稳态项，这些项与内禀能带几何响应（如反常霍尔效应、自旋/轨道/谷输运）竞争。需要发展超越NCA的动力学理论以正确描述无序散射与能带几何的相互作用。
AI.method: 在长度规范下采用高斯白噪声无序势，将杂质散射推进到四阶（V⁴），通过迭代求解杂质诱导的密度矩阵涨落，减去不连通杂质配对避免双重计数，得到连通的V⁴碰撞积分。将贡献分解为自能修正、梯型顶点重正化和交叉量子干涉（X型和Ψ型）。
AI.result: 在二维大质量狄拉克费米子模型中：①得到Born级单粒子寿命、输运弛豫时间和纵向电导率的解析表达式；②交叉杂质过程产生τ⁰阶外禀反常霍尔电导，与内禀贝里曲率项共存；③Ψ型交叉贡献抵消，X型贡献保持有限。
AI.conclusion: 该形式论为将能带几何和交叉无序修正纳入多带输运提供了自洽途径，可推广至自旋、赝自旋、轨道和谷现象的研究。

title: A Signal Analysis Framework for Unshielded Room-Temperature Magnetocardiography
summary: Room-temperature, unshielded recording of cardiac magnetic signals has remained a significant challenge since the inception of magnetocardiography (MCG). In this work, we present an MCG system based on optically pumped magnetometers (OPMs) designed to operate in ambient magnetic environments and acquire adult human cardiac magnetic fields, without the need for active or passive shielding. The system operates in a gradiometer configuration, achieving background-noise cancellation with a common-mode rejection ratio (CMRR) of 31 dB and a gradient sensitivity of 314 $\mathrm{fT/cm/\sqrt{Hz}}$. MCG signals were acquired sequentially at 16 locations across the anterior thorax, and a comprehensive signal-analysis framework incorporating wavelet multiscale principal component analysis (WMSPCA) filtering and signal quality estimation (SQE) scoring was developed to enhance signal quality. This framework yielded a QRS complex signal-to-noise ratio (SNR) of $28.56 \pm 5.61$ dB across all measurement locations. These results demonstrate the feasibility of performing clinical-grade MCG in unshielded, real-world magnetic environments, with consistent morphological fidelity across the QRS complex and T-wave segments. This work represents a meaningful step toward the practical deployment of OPM-based MCG systems in hospital and point-of-care settings.

AI.tldr: 本文展示了一种基于光泵磁力计（OPM）的心磁图（MCG）系统，可在无屏蔽的室温环境下记录成人心脏磁信号，采用梯度计配置（CMRR 31 dB，灵敏度314 fT/cm/√Hz），结合小波多尺度主成分分析（WMSPCA）滤波和信号质量估计（SQE）打分，在16个胸廓位置实现了QRS复合波信噪比28.56±5.61 dB，证明了临床级MCG在无屏蔽真实环境中的可行性。
AI.motivation: 自心磁图（MCG）诞生以来，在室温无屏蔽环境下记录心脏磁信号一直是一项重大挑战。
AI.method: 采用基于光泵磁力计（OPM）的MCG系统，以梯度计配置运行（共模抑制比31 dB，梯度灵敏度314 fT/cm/√Hz）；在无源/无源屏蔽的 ambient 磁场环境中依次采集16个前胸位置的MCG信号；开发了包含小波多尺度主成分分析（WMSPCA）滤波和信号质量估计（SQE）打分的综合分析框架。
AI.result: 在所有测量位置，QRS复合波的信噪比（SNR）达到28.56 ± 5.61 dB，且QRS复合波和T波段的形态保真度一致。
AI.conclusion: 这项工作证明了在无屏蔽的真实磁场环境中实现临床级MCG的可行性，为基于OPM的MCG系统在医院和即时检测场景中的实际部署迈出了有意义的一步。

title: Ultrasound Evidence for a Low-Temperature Anomaly Inside the Superconducting State of 4Hb-TaS$_2$
summary: We report low-temperature ultrasound measurements on single crystals of the layered van der Waals superconductor 4Hb-TaS$_2$. Specific heat and ac magnetic susceptibility show a sharp bulk superconducting transition at $T_{\rm c}\approx 2.9$~K. Ultrasound measurements reveal an additional anomaly deep inside the superconducting state near $T^{*}\approx 1$~K. The most direct signature is observed in the relative ultrasonic attenuation change $Δα$: instead of being rapidly suppressed at $T_{\rm c}$, $Δα$ remains large throughout the intermediate superconducting regime and drops strongly only near $T^{*}$. This loss of acoustic dissipation is accompanied by a pronounced anomaly in the relative sound velocity change $Δv/v$, indicating strong coupling to the lattice. The low-temperature anomaly is rapidly suppressed by magnetic field and by Se substitution, suggesting a possible superconducting origin of the anomaly. We speculate that this feature may be related to induced superconductivity in the 1T layers.

AI.tldr: 本文通过超声测量在层状范德瓦尔斯超导体4Hb-TaS₂中发现超导态内部约1K处存在反常异常（T*），表现为超声衰减在T_c以下持续存在直至T*才急剧下降，伴随声速异常，可能源于1T层中的诱导超导性。
AI.motivation: 探索层状范德瓦尔斯超导体4Hb-TaS₂在超导态内部的低能激发行为，特别是可能存在的多带或多层超导序参量耦合现象。
AI.method: 对4Hb-TaS₂单晶进行低温超声测量（超声衰减和声速变化），结合比热和交流磁化率测量，以及磁场和Se替代实验。
AI.result: 在T_c≈2.9K处观察到体超导转变；在T*≈1K处超导态内部发现额外异常：超声衰减在T_c至T*之间保持高值，在T*处才急剧下降，同时声速出现明显异常；该异常被磁场和Se替代快速抑制。
AI.conclusion: 4Hb-TaS₂的超导态存在两个特征温度尺度，T*处异常可能与1T层中的诱导超导性有关，揭示了该材料中不同层之间超导序参量的复杂耦合行为。

title: Structural properties of one-dimensional $\mathrm{Cs}_2\mathrm{CoCl}_4$ confined within single-walled carbon nanotubes
comment: Thirteen pages including Supplementary Information. Four figures in the main text, and seven figures in the Supplementary Information
summary: Crystals under one-dimensional (1D) confinement are well-known to exhibit drastic changes in metallicity, magnetic properties and chemical state, however, the intermediate phase space between binary metal halides and ternary metal halide perovskites remains poorly explored, especially in the context of the rich polymorphism exhibited by both families in the one-dimensional limit. Through aberration-corrected (scanning) transmission electron microscopy and multislice simulations, it is shown that the metal halide $\mathrm{Cs}_2\mathrm{CoCl}_4$ crystallizes in the tetragonal $\wp4/mcc$ and orthorhombic $\wp{mcm}$ rod groups under radial compression within single-walled carbon nanotubes (SWCNTs) of increasingly small diameter, with a massive re-entrant orthorhombic strain towards the $1$ $\mathrm{nm}$ extremum. The persistence of $\mathrm{Co}^{2+}$ is determined from fits to the d.c. magnetization, with a surprisingly small increase in the effective moment ($4.607(3)$ to $4.788(3) \mathit{μ}_\mathrm{B}/\mathrm{f.u.}$) and Weiss constant ($-7.9(3)$ to $-4.09(7) \mathrm{K}$) after confinement in the SWCNTs, suggesting that the confined structure topologically preserves the core magnetic properties of the bulk. Both unconventional polymorphs observed are noticeably different to the high-pressure piezochromic polymorph previously shown to undergo a tetrahedral-to-octahedral coordination transition, highlighting 1D confinement as a unique tool for structural manipulation.

AI.tldr: 本文研究发现，Cs₂CoCl₄在单壁碳纳米管的一维限域下，会结晶出两种非常规的多晶型（四方晶系P4/mcc和正交晶系Pmcm），且随管径减小出现显著的正交应变；限域后Co²⁺的有效磁矩和Weiss常数变化很小，表明核心磁性基本保留，这与高压下发生的配位转变截然不同，突显一维限域是一种独特的结构调控手段。
AI.motivation: 一维限域下，二元金属卤化物与三元金属卤化物钙钛矿之间的中间相空间探索不足，尤其是两者在低维下丰富的多晶型行为缺乏系统研究。
AI.method: 利用球差校正（扫描）透射电子显微镜和multislice模拟，观察Cs₂CoCl₄在单壁碳纳米管中的晶体结构；通过直流磁化率拟合确定Co²⁺的价态和磁性质。
AI.result: Cs₂CoCl₄在管径递减的SWCNTs中分别结晶为四方晶系P4/mcc和正交晶系Pmcm，且在~1 nm极端下出现显著的正交应变回滞；限域后有效磁矩从4.607(3)增至4.788(3) μ_B/f.u.，Weiss常数从-7.9(3)增至-4.09(7) K，变化较小。
AI.conclusion: 一维限域可诱导出与高压多晶型截然不同的非常规结构，且能拓扑保持材料的核心磁性质，因此一维限域可作为独特且有效的结构调控策略。

title: Unusual upper critical field in UTe2 revealed by magnetotransport measurements up to 42 T
summary: The heavy-fermion superconductor UTe2 is unique in that, at ambient pressure, it exhibits three distinct superconducting phases, two of which are induced by magnetic field. When the field is applied along the crystallographic b axis in the orthorhombic structure, the field-induced phase SC2 develops above approximately 20 T and persists up to the metamagnetic transition at Hm about 34 T. When the magnetic field is tilted towards the c axis, another superconducting phase, SC3, emerges at very high fields above about 40 T over a certain angular range. The origin of this exotic phase remains under debate. One of the key open questions regarding the origin of SC3 is whether it is confined to the spin-polarized state above Hm, or whether it already develops at lower fields. Here, we report magnetoresistance measurements performed on a high-quality single crystal of UTe2 in static magnetic fields up to 42 T applied in the (bc) plane at temperatures down to 0.35 K. At this temperature, we find that the SC3 phase first appears at an angle of 20 deg from the b axis. At larger angles, the onset of the SC3 phase, defined by a maximum in resistivity, occurs below Hm. However, zero resistivity is reached only above Hm throughout the entire angular range investigated. These results are summarized in the resulting field-angle phase diagram. Furthermore, we find that at 21 deg the SC3 phase is rapidly suppressed with increasing temperature, whereas at 24 deg it becomes considerably more robust and persists up to about 1 K. Finally, we observe Shubnikov de Haas (SdH) oscillations in the vicinity of the c axis. The observed oscillation frequencies are in good agreement with our previous results. The field dependence of the strongest SdH frequency and of the effective mass is discussed.

AI.tldr: 本文通过高场磁阻测量，研究了重费米子超导体UTe2中第三个超导相SC3的起源，发现SC3在低于或高于亚稳态转变场Hm时都可以出现，但零电阻态仅在Hm以上达到，表明其与自旋极化态密切相关。
AI.motivation: 揭示UTe2中第三个超导相SC3的起源，特别是它是否局限于自旋极化态(Hm以上)，还是在更低磁场下就已存在。
AI.method: 在静态磁场高达42 T、(bc)面内不同角度下，对高质量UTe2单晶进行磁阻测量，温度低至0.35 K，并观测Shubnikov de Haas振荡。
AI.result: SC3相在b轴20°首次出现；大角度时电阻最大值的onset低于Hm，但零电阻仅在Hm以上达到；21°时SC3易被温度抑制，24°时更稳定，可维持到约1 K；观测到SdH振荡，频率与之前结果一致。
AI.conclusion: SC3相并非完全局限于Hm以上，其onset可在更低场出现，但宏观超导(零电阻)需要自旋极化态(Hm以上)支持，这为理解UTe2中非常规超导相的起源提供了关键约束。

title: Topological phase and its effective tuning in a ladder lattice
summary: We study a two-leg ladder model consists of a one-dimensional (1D) Su-Schrieffer-Heeger (SSH) lattice with staggered nearest-neighboring hopping amplitudes and a normal 1D tight-binding lattice with uniform hopping. By varying the strength of inter-leg coupling, we find that topologically nontrivial phase with zero-energy edge modes will emerge, even when the SSH leg is in the trivial regime. Compared with the single SSH model, the nontrivial region in the parameter space is significantly expanded in the ladder. The topological phase is characterized by quantized Berry phase, and the phase boundaries are determined analytically. We also analyze the distributions of topological zero modes in the ladder, and find that the nontrivial regime can be further divided into two regions, which are separated by a gap closing point in the energy spectrum and correspond to the cases with edge modes residing in different legs. These results indicate that the topological phase and edge modes can be effectively tuned through the manipulations in the trivial lattice. Our work unveils the emergence of nontrivial topology in the ladder lattices and provides a new platform for studying topological phases.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了一种由SSH链和普通均匀跳跃链组成的双层梯子模型，发现通过调节层间耦合，即使在SSH链处于平庸区域时也能产生拓扑非平庸相和零能边界态，且拓扑区域相比单一SSH模型显著扩大。拓扑相由量子化的Berry相位表征，非平庸区域可进一步分为边界态位于不同链的两个子区域。
AI.motivation: 探索通过平庸晶格的调控来诱导和操控拓扑相与边界态的可能性，揭示梯子晶格中涌现的非平庸拓扑现象，为拓扑物态研究提供新平台。
AI.method: 构建双层梯子模型（SSH链+正常均匀跳跃链），调节层间耦合强度；通过Berry相位量化拓扑性质，解析求解相边界，分析零能边界态的空间分布。
AI.result: 层间耦合可诱导出拓扑非平庸相，扩大参数空间中的非平庸区域；非平庸区被能隙闭合点分为两个子区域，对应边界态分别位于SSH链和正常链。
AI.conclusion: 通过调控平庸晶格可以有效控制拓扑相和边界态，梯子结构为研究拓扑相提供了新的平台。

title: Pseudo entropy and topological phases of matter
summary: Entanglement entropy has proven to be a powerful probe of phenomena such as quantum chaos and phase transitions. Pseudo entropy is a recently proposed time-like generalization of an entanglement measure, motivated by de Sitter holography. In this work, we find that pseudo entropy can also serve as a novel probe for distinguishing topological phases of matter. For this, we consider the Su--Schrieffer--Heeger model as a representative example and investigate the averaged excess entropy $ΔS_{12}$, defined as the difference between pseudo entropy and the average entanglement entropy, across the topological-to-trivial and trivial-to-topological phase transitions. When the two states are in the same phase, we find that $ ΔS_{12}$ is non-positive under periodic boundary conditions, while for open boundary conditions, it is non-positive only when the system is sufficiently large. Moreover, we analyze ground-state quench protocols for topology-crossing quenches and find that the imaginary pseudo entropy tracks the critical times predicted by the Fisher zeros.

AI.tldr: 本文发现伪熵（pseudo entropy）可以作为区分拓扑相的新型探针。以Su-Schrieffer-Heeger模型为例，研究了平均过剩熵ΔS₁₂在拓扑相变中的行为，发现同相时ΔS₁₂非正（周期边界）或足够大系统下非正（开放边界），并通过基态淬火协议发现虚伪熵可追踪Fisher零点预测的临界时间。
AI.motivation: 动机是将伪熵（一种类时间广义纠缠度量，原由de Sitter全息启发）推广为区分拓扑物质相的新型探针。
AI.method: 以Su-Schrieffer-Heeger模型为代表，定义平均过剩熵ΔS₁₂ = 伪熵 - 平均纠缠熵，分析其在拓扑-平庸和平庸-拓扑相变中的行为，并利用基态淬火协议研究拓扑跨越淬火过程。
AI.result: 1) 同相时，周期边界下ΔS₁₂非正；开放边界下仅当系统足够大时非正。2) 虚伪熵能追踪Fisher零点预测的临界时间。
AI.conclusion: 伪熵可作为区分拓扑相的新探针，其虚部在动力学淬火中能揭示临界行为。

title: Multiple closely spaced transitions and multi-band Hall response in clean ScV$_6$Sn$_6$
summary: The kagome metal ScV$_6$Sn$_6$ has attracted attention as a platform for exploring the interplay between charge density wave (CDW) order and symmetry-breaking phenomena, including a recently reported intermediate phase and a low-field Hall anomaly that has been attributed to an anomalous Hall effect (AHE). The interpretation of both observations has been limited by the modest sample quality achieved by previous growth procedures, which produced crystals with in-plane residual resistivity ratios (RRR) of at most $\approx$9. Here, we report a simple modification of the flux growth procedure that yields ScV$_6$Sn$_6$ single crystals with RRR exceeding 50, more than five times the previous highest reported value, and use this expanded mobility range to revisit both the symmetry and the magnetotransport of the CDW phase. We resolve a sequence of closely spaced transitions in the immediate vicinity of $T_{CDW}$ that emerges above a sharp threshold of RRR $\approx 4$, and demonstrate through elastoresistivity that the intermediate phase breaks the three-fold rotational symmetry of the parent lattice. We examine the Hall response from both the parent samples across the full RRR range as well as Cr-doped samples, and conclude it is quantitatively inconsistent with an intrinsic AHE and is instead explained by ordinary multi-band transport involving small, high-mobility pockets identified through quantum oscillations. These results refine the symmetry-breaking landscape of ScV$_6$Sn$_6$ and establish systematic mobility tuning as a diagnostic for disentangling an intrinsic AHE from multi-band Hall contributions in kagome CDW systems.

AI.tldr: 本文通过改进助熔剂生长法，制备出残余电阻比（RRR）超过50的高质量ScV₆Sn₆单晶（此前最高≈9），发现其CDW相附近存在一系列紧密相变，中间相破坏了晶格的三重旋转对称性，并证明先前归因于反常霍尔效应（AHE）的低温霍尔异常实际上源于普通多能带输运，而非内禀AHE。
AI.motivation: ScV₆Sn₆因其CDW序与对称性破缺现象的相互作用而备受关注，但此前报道的中间相和低场霍尔反常（归因于AHE）的解释受到样品质量不足（RRR≤9）的严重限制。作者旨在通过提高样品质量来厘清这些物理机制。
AI.method: 对助熔剂生长法进行简单改进，获得RRR>50的高质量单晶；利用弹性电阻率测量分析对称性破缺；通过跨RRR范围的霍尔响应测量、Cr掺杂实验及量子振荡分析，区分内禀AHE与多能带输运贡献。
AI.result: 1) 成功制备RRR>50的晶体，是此前最高值的5倍以上；2) 在T_CDW附近发现一系列紧密相变（出现在RRR>4的阈值以上）；3) 弹性电阻率证明中间相破坏了三重旋转对称性；4) 霍尔响应定量上与内禀AHE不一致，而是由小、高迁移率口袋的普通多能带输运解释。
AI.conclusion: 这些结果精炼了ScV₆Sn₆的对称性破缺图景，并建立了系统迁移率调控作为区分kagome CDW系统中内禀AHE与多能带霍尔贡献的诊断方法。

title: Interplay of Electrode Coupling Engineering, Quasiperiodicity, and Magnetic Flux in Quantum Transport through a Su-Schrieffer-Heeger Ring
summary: We reveal that engineering electrode-coupling configurations can fundamentally reshape coherent transport phenomena in quasiperiodic quantum systems. Leveraging nonequilibrium Green's function theory, we systematically analyze charge and heat transport, as well as current fluctuations, in a magnetic-flux-threaded quasiperiodic Su-Schrieffer-Heeger ring with both symmetric and asymmetric multi-site reservoir couplings. Contrary to the conventional expectation that optimal transport is achieved near the homogeneous-hopping limit, our results reveal that multi-site lead coupling fundamentally reshapes the transport landscape, extending the regime of enhanced transport deep into the topological phase. Strikingly, asymmetric source-drain coupling induces a disorder-assisted conducting phase where quasiperiodic modulation enhances, rather than suppresses, charge and energy transport. Magnetic flux exerts a dual influence: it activates additional interference-mediated transmission channels that amplify transport while simultaneously suppressing the disorder-induced re-entrant conducting regime. Furthermore, we uncover a flux-driven migration of the optimal transport window with increasing disorder strength, shifting from the topological regime toward the trivial-hopping regime. This behavior highlights the intricate interplay among quasiperiodicity, dimerization, magnetic-flux-induced quantum interference, and the geometry of the system-reservoir coupling. Collectively, our findings position coupling engineering as a powerful paradigm for the rational control of nonequilibrium transport in quasiperiodic materials and chart a route toward quantum device configurations in which transport characteristics can be precisely tuned via the interplay of disorder, topology, and quantum interference.

AI.tldr: 该研究揭示了电极-耦合构型可以根本性地重塑准周期量子系统中的相干输运现象。通过非平衡格林函数理论，系统分析了磁通穿过的准周期Su-Schrieffer-Heeger环中对称和非对称多点位库耦合下的电荷、热输运及电流涨落。研究发现，多点位引线耦合将增强输运的区域深入扩展到拓扑相；非对称源-漏耦合诱导出无序辅助的导电相；磁通激活了额外的干涉介导传输通道，同时抑制了无序诱导的重入导电区。此外，还发现磁通驱动的最优输运窗口随无序强度增加从拓扑区向平凡跳跃区迁移。
AI.motivation: 揭示电极-耦合构型对准周期量子系统中相干输运现象的深层影响，挑战传统认为最优输运发生在均匀跳跃极限附近的认知，探索通过耦合工程实现输运调控的新范式。
AI.method: 采用非平衡格林函数理论，系统分析磁通穿过的准周期Su-Schrieffer-Heeger环中，对称和非对称多点位库耦合下的电荷输运、热输运以及电流涨落特性。
AI.result: 1) 多点位引线耦合将增强输运区域深入扩展到拓扑相；2) 非对称源-漏耦合诱导出无序辅助的导电相，准周期调制反而增强输运；3) 磁通通过激活额外干涉通道促进输运，同时抑制无序诱导的重入导电区；4) 发现磁通驱动的最优输运窗口随无序强度增加从拓扑区向平凡跳跃区迁移。
AI.conclusion: 耦合工程可成为准周期材料中非平衡输运理性调控的有力范式，通过无序、拓扑和量子干涉的协同作用，可实现输运特性的精确调谐，为量子器件构型设计指明方向。

title: Finite-resolution exhaustive traversal of thermodynamic state spaces has divergent thermodynamic length
summary: Continuous space-filling maps can be surjective onto higher-dimensional regions, but thermodynamic protocols are rectifiable finite-resolution paths. We study exhaustive traversal of a compact $d$-dimensional thermodynamic state-space window $(\mathcal{M},g)$ by curves $H_\varepsilon$ whose images are $\varepsilon$-dense in intrinsic distance. A standard covering/tube estimate gives $L_g[H_\varepsilon]\ge C_g\varepsilon^{1-d}-O(\varepsilon)$ for every regular $d>1$ window. The geometry is classical; the contribution is to turn it into an operational resource law for thermodynamic coverage. When the physical friction tensor $ζ$ coincides with, or uniformly dominates, the coverage metric $g$, Cauchy--Schwarz for the quadratic slow-driving action gives $W_{\rm ex}^{(2)}\ge L_ζ^2/τ=Ω(\varepsilon^{2(1-d)}/τ)$. Equivalently, at fixed quadratic excess-work budget, maintaining slow driving requires $τ=Ω(\varepsilon^{2(1-d)})$. We derive microscopic friction metrics for a detailed-balance three-state Markov jump process, $ζ_{ij}=(β/γ)(π_iδ_{ij}-π_iπ_j)$, and for an overdamped harmonic trap, $\mathrm d\ell_ζ^2=μ^{-1}\mathrm da^2+(4βμk^3)^{-1}\mathrm dk^2$. In the trap, a raster scan gives $L_ζ\simΔ_g^{-1}$ and fixed-time $W_{\rm ex}^{(2)}\simΔ_g^{-2}$, while fixed dwell time shifts the cost to acquisition time. A laboratory or simulation floor cuts off the continuum divergence as $L_{\rm op}=Θ(\max\{\varepsilon,Δ_g\}^{1-d})$. Controlled singular response-proxy metrics diagnose critical prefactors and directional integrability, but are not physical friction tensors unless derived from microscopic dynamics. Morton/Z-order preserves the exponent while increasing locality-dependent amplitudes.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了热力学协议中连续空间填充曲线对d维状态空间的穷尽遍历问题。通过几何覆盖估计，推导出曲线长度下界L_g ≥ C_g ε^{1-d} - O(ε)。当摩擦张量与覆盖度量一致时，利用Cauchy-Schwarz不等式得到二次过剩功的下界W_ex^(2) ≥ Ω(ε^{2(1-d)}/τ)。以三态马尔可夫跳变过程和过阻尼谐振子陷阱为例推导微观摩擦度量，并分析了光栅扫描和Morton/Z-order等路径的代价特征。
AI.motivation: 将经典几何理论转化为热力学覆盖的操作性资源律，建立状态空间遍历中路径长度、驱动时间和过剩功之间的基本权衡关系，为热力学协议设计提供理论指导。
AI.method: 采用标准覆盖/管状邻域估计推导曲线长度下界；利用Cauchy-Schwarz不等式将几何约束转化为热力学代价；通过详细平衡三态马尔可夫跳变过程和过阻尼谐振子陷阱推导微观摩擦度量张量；分析光栅扫描和Z-order路径的标度行为。
AI.result: 建立了曲线长度下界L_g ≥ C_g ε^{1-d}。当摩擦张量ζ与度量g一致时，二次过剩功W_ex^(2) ≥ Ω(ε^{2(1-d)}/τ)，或等价地，固定预算下慢驱动时间τ = Ω(ε^{2(1-d)})。给出了三态马尔可夫过程和过阻尼谐振子陷阱的摩擦度量显式形式。光栅扫描中L_ζ ∼ Δ_g^{-1}，W_ex^(2) ∼ Δ_g^{-2}。实验室截断使路径长度变为L_op = Θ(max{ε, Δ_g}^{1-d})。
AI.conclusion: 几何约束可转化为热力学覆盖的操作性资源律，微观摩擦度量可由动力学推导，实验室/模拟截断消除连续发散，Morton/Z-order保持指数但改变局部依赖幅度。

title: Oblate Spheroid Excitation Theory: A Unified, Lattice-Free Foundation for Plastic Deformation from Which Dislocations Emerge as Collective Excitations
summary: Dislocation theory has underpinned crystal plasticity for a century, yet its lattice-dependent definition cannot describe plastic flow in grain boundaries, glasses, ceramics, or nanocrystals near the glass transition, where no periodic lattice exists. We propose the Oblate Spheroid Excitation Theory (OSET): the elementary carrier of plastic deformation, in any solid, is a shear-eigenstrained oblate spheroid, the oblate-spheroidal transformation zone (OSTZ), treated within Eshelby's inclusion theory. The OSTZ requires no lattice and has a finite, non-singular, intrinsically thermally activated energy and stress fields. Three results are proved: a single OSTZ produces a non-singular elastic dipole, not a dislocation's singular field; a co-planar chain of N OSTZs is mathematically identical to a Peierls-Nabarro dislocation, core width and Burgers vector fixed by OSTZ geometry; and a genuine dislocation nucleates only once the chain reaches a host-lattice-set critical length. Dislocations emerge as a collective, large-$N$ limit of OSET rather than an assumed entity, and the theoretical shear strength, Peierls stress, core energy, Frank-Read critical stress, and stacking-fault energy follow as derived, parameter-free quantities. OSET is validated against grain-boundary-sliding data, independent literature spanning metals, ceramics, and bulk metallic glasses, and a recent 41-system compilation, reproducing the fitted dilatational and shear eigenstrains to within 2% and 15%, respectively. Because classical dislocation theory emerges from OSET but OSET does not require dislocations, it provides, in our view, a more fundamental, broadly applicable foundation for plastic deformation across material classes.

AI.tldr: 本文提出扁球体激发理论（OSET），认为塑性变形的基本载体是剪切本征应变的扁球体（OSTZ），而非传统位错。OSET可适用于无周期晶格的材料（如晶界、玻璃、陶瓷等），且无需假设位错存在即可推导出传统位错理论的关键物理量，并在多种材料体系中得到验证。
AI.motivation: 传统位错理论依赖晶格周期性，无法描述晶界、玻璃、陶瓷及近玻璃转变纳米晶体中无周期晶格结构的塑性流动，亟需一种不依赖晶格的、更普适的塑性变形理论。
AI.method: 提出Oblate Spheroid Excitation Theory (OSET)，将剪切本征应变的扁球体（OSTZ）作为塑性变形的基本载体，借助Eshelby夹杂理论处理其能量和应力场，并通过OSTZ链与Peierls-Nabarro位错的数学等价性，将位错视为OSET在大N极限下的集体涌现行为。
AI.result: 单个OSTZ产生非奇异的弹性偶极子而非奇异位错场；N个OSTZ构成的共面链与Peierls-Nabarro位错数学等价；位错仅在链长达到晶格决定的临界长度时成核。推导的理论剪切强度、Peierls应力、核能、Frank-Read临界应力和层错能均为无参数预言值。在晶界滑动数据、跨材料体系文献及41种材料系统验证中，膨胀和剪切本征应变分别再现至2%和15%以内。
AI.conclusion: OSET比经典位错理论更为基础和普适，位错是OSET的涌现现象而非基本假定，为跨材料类别的塑性变形提供了统一的理论基础。

title: Winding-Sector Transitions and Thermodynamic Incommensurability in Helical Valence Bond Phase under Tilted Boundary Conditions
summary: We investigate the ground states of the $S = 1/2$ staircase $J$-$Q_3$ model in the maximally anisotropic limit by employing projector quantum Monte Carlo simulations. To overcome boundary-induced finite-size ambiguities inherent in the study of spatially modulated structures, we implement a $45^{\circ}$ tilted periodic boundary condition that eliminates intermediate phases and provides direct access to winding-sector transitions of the system. By defining a domain wall density to quantify the spatial modulation of the helical valence bond phase, we perform thermodynamic extrapolations and demonstrate that both the domain wall density and the characteristic wavevector evolve continuously with the coupling ratio, exhibiting no commensurate lock-in behavior. Our results establish that the helical valence bond phase is a genuine two-dimensional incommensurate phase with long-range bond-bond order in the thermodynamic limit, clarifying that winding-sector transitions are finite-size effects enforced by boundary commensurability. Furthermore, we determine the phase transition point between columnar valence bond solid phase and helical valence bond phase to be $g_c = 0.046(2)$.

AI.tldr: 本文利用投影量子蒙特卡洛模拟，在最大各向异性极限下研究S=1/2阶梯J-Q3模型的基态。通过45度倾斜周期边界条件消除有限尺寸效应，证明螺旋价键相是真正的二维非公度相，并精确确定了柱状价键固相到螺旋价键相的相变点。
AI.motivation: 研究螺旋价键相的的本质——它究竟是真正的二维非公度相，还是由有限尺寸效应和边界条件导致的伪影？
AI.method: 使用投影量子蒙特卡洛模拟，并创新性地引入45度倾斜周期边界条件，通过定义畴壁密度来量化螺旋价键相的空间调制。
AI.result: 畴壁密度和特征波矢随耦合比连续变化，无公度锁定行为；确定相变点g_c=0.046(2)；证明了螺旋价键相是热力学极限下具有长程键-键序的二维非公度相。
AI.conclusion: 螺旋价键相是真正的二维非公度相，而 winding-sector 转变仅为有限尺寸效应；倾斜边界条件是研究空间调制结构的有效方法。

title: Coherent and Incoherent Interfacial Spin Transport: Quantum-to-Classical Crossover in Spin Superfluids
summary: We investigate the thermodynamics of interfacial spin transport within a normal metal/ferromagnetic insulator/normal metal ($\mathrm{NM/FMI/NM}$) trilayer heterostructure, where the central magnetic layer is described by the anisotropic quantum XXZ model. By employing the self-consistent harmonic approximation (SCHA) combined with a microscopic linear response formulation, we evaluate the interfacial spin-mixing conductance $g_{\uparrow\downarrow}$ across all spin regimes. We demonstrate that $g_{\uparrow\downarrow}$ uniquely decomposes into a coherent condensed component ($g_{\mathrm{cond}}$), driven by the macroscopic phase of the spin superfluid, and an incoherent fluctuation-driven term ($g_{\mathrm{fluct}}$) mediated by stochastic thermal magnons. Crucially, in the extreme quantum limit of $S = 1/2$, $g_{\mathrm{cond}}$ drops steeply and vanishes at a finite coherence temperature $T_{\mathrm{coh}}$. Conversely, the fluctuation-driven term $g_{\mathrm{fluct}}$ vanishes at $T = 0$, exhibits a characteristic $T^2$ quadratic scaling at low temperatures, and undergoes a systematic $1/S$ amplitude suppression as the macroscopic magnetization becomes robust. Our microscopic insights bridge the gap between quantum many-body fluctuations and macroscopic spin-superfluid hydrodynamics, providing clear foundational principles for optimizing long-range coherent transport in quantum spintronic devices.

AI.tldr: 本文通过自洽谐波近似和线性响应理论，研究了NM/FMI/NM三明治异质结构中界面自旋输运的热力学性质。发现界面自旋混合电导可分解为自旋超流凝聚态成分（$g_{\mathrm{cond}}$）和热涨落驱动成分（$g_{\mathrm{fluct}}$），并在$S=1/2$量子极限下揭示了$g_{\mathrm{cond}}$在有限相干温度$T_{\mathrm{coh}}$处消失，而$g_{\mathrm{fluct}}$呈现$T^2$标度行为并受到$1/S$抑制。
AI.motivation: 旨在从微观量子涨落角度理解NM/FMI/NM异质结构中的界面自旋输运机制，特别是如何桥接量子多体涨落与宏观自旋超流体动力学，为量子自旋电子学中长程相干输运的优化提供理论基础。
AI.method: 采用自洽谐波近似（SCHA）结合微观线性响应理论，对各向异性量子XXZ模型描述的磁性中间层进行热力学分析，计算界面自旋混合电导$g_{\uparrow\downarrow}$及其分解成分。
AI.result: $g_{\uparrow\downarrow}$可分解为凝聚态成分$g_{\mathrm{cond}}$（由自旋超流体的宏观相位驱动）和涨落成分$g_{\mathrm{fluct}}$（由热激发的随机磁振子介导）。在$S=1/2$量子极限下，$g_{\mathrm{cond}}$在有限相干温度$T_{\mathrm{coh}}$处陡降为零；而$g_{\mathrm{fluct}}$在$T=0$时为零，低温下呈$T^2$标度，随$S$增大受$1/S$抑制。
AI.conclusion: 本文的微观分析填补了量子多体涨落与宏观自旋超流体动力学之间的鸿沟，为优化量子自旋电子器件中的长程相干输运提供了清晰的基础原理。

title: Poisson-shot-noise hybrid machines: efficiency and quasistatic divergence
summary: We study stochastic models of a microscopic active heat engine, comprised of an overdamped Brownian particle trapped in a harmonic potential, and in simultaneous contact with thermal (passive) and athermal (active) baths. The interaction with the active bath is modeled as a stochastic force described by Poisson shot-noise (PSN) having a specified amplitude distribution. With analytical calculations and numerical simulations, we study the thermodynamic performance of the machine to quasistatic cyclic protocols analogous to those running two-stroke and Stirling-like engines. For specific parameter ranges, the thermodynamic behavior is that of a $\textit{hybrid machine}$, simultaneously operating as a heat engine with respect to the passive/active baths and as a refrigerator with respect to the passive/active baths. Focusing on the parameter region where the overall performance is such of an engine, we show that the average total extracted work per cycle divided by average total heat intake from the cold baths per cycle may surpass the Carnot efficiency associated with the temperature of the passive baths. Applying the second law for active heat engines, we focus on a bona fide efficiency (bounded by Carnot's efficiency) that incorporates an information-theoretic metric $\mathcal{I}-$ which we call $\textit{quasistatic divergence}-$ quantifying how distinguishable are the engine's statistics in the quasistatic limit with respect to a continually changing equilibrium distribution. We analyze, with theory and numerical simulations, how the PSN shot rate and the degree of non-Gaussianity in the particle position distribution influence the efficiency of the engine, and explore the correlation between non-Gaussianity and efficiency. Our findings reveal optimal PSN shot rates maximizing the engine's efficiency and an intriguing non-bijective relation between efficiency and kurtosis

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了一种微观主动热机，它由过阻尼布朗粒子在简谐势阱中同时接触热（被动）和主动（非热）浴构成。主动浴由泊松散粒噪声（PSN）建模。通过准静态循环协议（类似二冲程和斯特林发动机），发现该机器可同时作为热机和制冷机运行。在引擎工作模式下，其效率可能超过被动浴温度对应的卡诺效率。论文引入了一种信息论度量——准静态散度——来定义真正的效率（受卡诺效率限制），并分析了PSN射击率和非高斯性对效率的影响，揭示了效率与峰度之间非一一对应的有趣关系。
AI.motivation: 理解微观主动热机的热力学性能，特别是当主动浴由泊松散粒噪声描述时，该混合机器可能同时表现出热机和制冷机的双重行为，并探索其效率超越传统卡诺极限的可能性。
AI.method: 采用解析计算和数值模拟方法，研究过阻尼布朗粒子在简谐势阱中同时接触热浴和主动（PSN）浴的随机模型。分析准静态循环协议（二冲程和斯特林类引擎），引入信息论度量（准静态散度）定义真正的效率，并分析PSN射击率、非高斯性（峰度）与效率的关系。
AI.result: 在特定参数范围内，机器表现出混合行为，同时作为热机和制冷机运行。在引擎模式下，平均总提取功除以冷浴总吸热量可能超过被动浴温度对应的卡诺效率。发现了最优PSN射击率可最大化引擎效率，以及效率与峰度之间存在非一一对应的关系。
AI.conclusion: 该工作揭示了主动热机中由于非高斯噪声导致的丰富热力学行为，为理解主动浴系统中效率与信息论度量之间的关系提供了新见解。

title: Real-space identification of distinct magnetic configurations in a candidate d-wave altermagnet
summary: Altermagnetism is an emerging class of magnetic order characterized by momentum-dependent spin-split electronic structures despite vanishing net magnetization. Although momentum-space signatures consistent with altermagnetism have been reported in a growing number of materials, their relationship to the underlying real-space magnetic configurations remains incompletely understood, because similar spin-split electronic structures can arise from distinct magnetic orders. In the candidate d-wave altermagnet KV2Se2O, the magnetic origin of the observed momentum-dependent spin splitting has remained controversial. Here, we employ spin-polarized scanning tunnelling microscopy combined with magnetic-field-dependent quasiparticle interference imaging to determine the magnetic configuration of KV2Se2O at the atomic scale. Spin-resolved quasiparticle interference reveals a checkerboard-like antiparallel spin texture within the V2O layer and determines its interlayer spin arrangement across unit-cell step edges. Remarkably, we identify both C-type and G-type magnetic configurations, both of which generate similar spin-split electronic structures at the single-layer level but correspond to d-wave altermagnetic and conventional antiferromagnetic orders, respectively. These observations reveal a complex magnetic landscape arising from nearly degenerate magnetic states. Our results establish a direct connection between momentum-space spin splitting and real-space magnetic order, providing a framework for identifying the microscopic origin of spin-split electronic structures in altermagnetic materials.

AI.tldr: 本文通过自旋极化扫描隧道显微镜结合磁场依赖的准粒子干涉成像技术，在原子尺度上确定了KV2Se2O的磁性结构，发现该材料中存在C型（d波交变磁）和G型（传统反铁磁）两种准简并的磁构型，二者在单层水平上产生相似的自旋劈裂电子结构，揭示了动量空间自旋劈裂与实空间磁序之间的直接联系。
AI.motivation: 尽管越来越多材料中被报道存在与交变磁（altermagnetism）一致的动量空间特征，但这些特征与实空间磁构型之间的关系尚不完全清楚，因为相似的自旋劈裂电子结构可能源于不同的磁序。在候选d波交变磁体KV2Se2O中，观测到的动量依赖自旋劈裂的磁起源一直存在争议。
AI.method: 采用自旋极化扫描隧道显微镜（spin-polarized STM）结合磁场依赖的准粒子干涉（QPI）成像技术，在原子尺度上确定KV2Se2O的磁构型。
AI.result: 自旋分辨的准粒子干涉揭示V2O层内存在棋盘状反平行自旋纹理，并确定了跨单胞台阶的层间自旋排列。值得注意的是，同时识别出C型和G型两种磁构型，二者在单层水平产生相似的自旋劈裂电子结构，但分别对应d波交变磁序和传统反铁磁序。
AI.conclusion: 这些观测揭示了由近简并磁态导致的复杂磁景观。研究结果建立了动量空间自旋劈裂与实空间磁序之间的直接联系，为识别交变磁材料中自旋劈裂电子结构的微观起源提供了框架。

title: Energy Gap in Weakly Disordered Fractional Quantum Hall Liquids: Quantitative Comparison to GaAs Quantum Well Experiments at $ν= 1/3$
summary: Based on a recent experiment in high-quality GaAs quantum wells [Phys. Rev. Lett. 127, 056801 (2021)], we present a microscopic study of the energy gap in two-dimensional electron gases at filling factor $ν=1/3$, explicitly incorporating both finite layer thickness and disorder effects. The finite layer thickness is modeled by solving the Poisson-Schrödinger equations for the experimental devices, yielding the electron wave functions in the perpendicular direction. Using these and the disorder energy extracted from the experiment, we estimate the charge gap and the mobility gap at $ν=1/3$ in the weakly disordered lowest Landau level. Remarkably, both gaps show good quantitative agreement with the activation gap measured from the experiment in narrow quantum wells. Our results also indicate the potential need of incorporating higher subbands to make accurate theoretical predictions of the energy gap in wide quantum wells.

AI.tldr: 本文基于实验数据，通过考虑有限层厚和弱无序效应，对GaAs量子阱中ν=1/3填充因子下的能隙进行了微观研究，计算结果与实验激活能隙在窄阱中吻合良好，并指出宽阱中需考虑更高子带的影响。
AI.motivation: 实验发现ν=1/3分数量子霍尔态存在能隙，但理论计算与实验之间存在差距，需要将有限层厚和无序效应纳入微观模型以更好地解释实验测量结果。
AI.method: 通过求解泊松-薛定谔方程得到垂直于层面的电子波函数，结合实验提取的无序能量，在弱无序最低朗道能级下计算电荷能隙和迁移率能隙。
AI.result: 在窄量子阱中，计算得到的电荷能隙和迁移率能隙与实验测量的激活能隙在定量上吻合良好；宽阱中则需要考虑更高子带才能准确预测。
AI.conclusion: 有限层厚和无序效应是解释分数量子霍尔能隙的关键因素；宽阱情形下更高子带的参与不可忽视，这对未来理论研究具有指导意义。

title: Reproducible Ohmic bismuth contacts to $\textrm{MoS}_2$ nanotubes and nanoribbons
summary: Attaching metallic contacts to transition metal dichalcogenide nanostructures and in particular to $\textrm{MoS}_2$ has posed significant challenges over the past years. For $\textrm{MoS}_2$ nanotubes and nanoribbons, a highly promising material for field effect transistors as well as quantum electronic devices, this is even more the case due to the small, curved surface. So far all attempts there have led to a wide scatter of contact resistances on the same chip. Recently, for quasi two-dimensional, flat $\textrm{MoS}_2$ flakes, the use of semimetals has led to a breakthrough, making transparent and Ohmic contacts possible. Here, we demonstrate the steps required to reproducibly fabricate contacts to single, vapor phase grown $\textrm{MoS}_2$ nanotubes and nanowires. All devices display finite room-temperature two-point resistances in absence of gating, with a median value of $340\,\textrm{k}Ω$ in a large fabrication series. A detailed analysis elucidates the impact of the different fabrication changes.

AI.tldr: 本文展示了如何在单个气相生长的MoS₂纳米管和纳米线上可重复地制备接触电极，实现了室温下无栅压时的有限两触点电阻，中位值为340 kΩ，并详细分析了不同制备步骤的影响。
AI.motivation: MoS₂纳米管和纳米线是场效应晶体管和量子电子器件的理想材料，但由于其曲率小、表面积有限，在其上制备可靠且一致的金属接触极为困难，过去所有尝试都导致同一芯片上接触电阻高度分散。因此，迫切需要开发可重复的接触制备方法。
AI.method: 作者基于半金属在二维MoS₂薄片中实现欧姆接触的突破，开发了一系列可重复的制备步骤，用于在单个气相生长的MoS₂纳米管和纳米线上制作接触电极，并通过系统分析不同制备参数变化对接触性能的影响来优化工艺。
AI.result: 所有器件在无栅压条件下均呈现有限的两点电阻，中位值为340 kΩ，且在大型制备系列中表现出一致性。详细分析阐明了不同制备步骤变化对接触电阻的具体影响。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为MoS₂一维纳米结构提供了可重复的接触制备方案，解决了接触电阻高度分散的问题，为未来基于MoS₂纳米管/纳米线的电子器件应用奠定了工艺基础。

title: Kinetically Controlled Condensation Boundary Governing Indium Incorporation in InGaN Metal Organic Vapor Phase Epitaxy
summary: We combine in situ synchrotron X-ray crystal truncation rod measurements with a binary Burton-Cabrera-Frank model to quantify indium incorporation during InGaN growth by metal-organic vapor phase epitaxy (MOVPE) on GaN(0001). By distinguishing In adatoms from condensed droplets and incorporating coupled Ga-In incorporation kinetics, the model captures the intrinsically nonlinear dependence of indium composition on precursor flux and growth temperature. The critical In coverage corresponding to the maximum attainable In composition at a given temperature is determined by a kinetic balance between In adatom supply and incorporation capacity, defining a kinetically controlled condensation boundary that shifts with temperature and Ga flux. The model quantitatively predicts this boundary, in agreement with independent measurements, and provides a predictive framework for optimizing high-In-content InGaN growth while avoiding droplet formation.

AI.tldr: 本文通过原位同步辐射X射线晶体截断杆测量与二元Burton-Cabrera-Frank模型相结合，量化了InGaN生长过程中铟的掺入行为，成功预测了避免液滴形成的最优化条件。
AI.motivation: InGaN材料在光电器件中至关重要，但高In含量生长时In掺入的非线性行为及液滴形成问题缺乏定量理解，亟需一个预测性框架来优化生长工艺。
AI.method: 采用原位同步辐射X射线晶体截断杆测量技术与二元Burton-Cabrera-Frank模型相结合，区分In吸附原子与凝聚液滴，并引入耦合的Ga-In掺入动力学。
AI.result: 模型成功捕捉了In组分对前驱体通量和生长温度的非线性依赖关系；确定了临界In覆盖率（最大可达到In组分的决定因素）；定量预测了动力学控制的冷凝边界，与独立测量结果一致。
AI.conclusion: 该模型为优化高In含量InGaN生长提供了定量预测框架，可有效避免液滴形成。

title: What Does the Single-Particle Spectrum Imply on the Pairing Nature and Pairing Mechanism in La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$?
summary: The pairing mechanism of the bilayer nickelates La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$ remains a hotly-debated open question. Existing strong-coupling theories are divided into class favoring intralayer d-wave pairing and that favoring interlayer s-wave pairing, with the latter further divided into $d_{z^2}$ orbital dominated mechanism driven by orbital hybridization and $d_{x^2-y^2}$ orbital dominated mechanism driven by Hund's rule. Recent angle-resolved-photoemission-spectrum (ARPES) and scanning-tunneling-microscope (STM) combinedly reveal a nodeless full pairing gap with low anisotropy, supporting the s-wave pairing. Here we propose that the pairing gap along the Brillouin zone (BZ) diagonal can serve as a useful probe of pairing mechanism. Symmetry analysis suggests that orbital hybridization vanishes along the BZ diagonal, rendering that the pairing gaps on the $γ$- and $α/β$- pockets reflect the $d_{z^2}$- and $d_{x^2-y^2}$- orbital pairing strength respectively. Under the $d_{z^2}$ orbital dominated pairing mechanism driven by orbital hybridization, gap nodes are inevitable on the $α$- and $β$- pockets along the BZ diagonal, which conflicts with the full gap revealed by ARPES and the U-shaped dI/dV curve observed by STM. The Hund's rule driven pairing mechanism instead leads to a full pairing gap, which well fits the ARPES and STM results. Furthermore, through a random-phase-approximation based calculation, we show that the weak-coupling theory, which tends to yield a $d_{z^2}$-orbital dominated pairing, also leads to nodes or near-nodes on the $α$- and $β$- pockets along the BZ diagonal, conflicting with experiments. This analysis clarifies the dominant role of $d_{x^2-y^2}$ orbital in the pairing and establishes the Hund's rule driven pairing mechanism as the most relevant one in La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$.

AI.tldr: 本文通过分析布里渊区对角线上的配对能隙，排除了轨道杂化驱动的d_z²轨道主导配对机制，确立了Hund's rule驱动的d_{x²-y²}轨道主导配对机制是La₃Ni₂O₇中最相关的超导配对机制。
AI.motivation: bilayer镍酸盐La₃Ni₂O₇的配对机制存在激烈争议，强耦合理论分为层内d波配对和层间s波配对两大类，后者又分为d_z²轨道杂化驱动和d_{x²-y²}轨道Hund's rule驱动两种机制。实验已观测到无节点的全配对能隙，但哪种机制与之相容尚不明确。
AI.method: 对称性分析发现布里渊区对角线上轨道杂化消失，因此γ-pocket和α/β-pocket上的配对能隙分别反映d_z²和d_{x²-y²}轨道的配对强度。通过分析两种机制下的能隙结构，并与ARPES和STM实验对比，辅以随机相位近似（RPA）弱耦合计算进行验证。
AI.result: d_z²轨道主导的配对机制在α-和β-pocket沿BZ对角线方向必然产生能隙节点，与实验观测的全能隙矛盾；而Hund's rule驱动的d_{x²-y²}轨道配对机制产生全能隙，与ARPES的节点无间隙结果及STM的U形dI/dV曲线吻合。RPA弱耦合计算也显示d_z²主导的配对会导致节点或近节点，与实验冲突。
AI.conclusion: d_{x²-y²}轨道在配对中起主导作用，Hund's rule驱动的配对机制是La₃Ni₂O₇中最相关的超导配对机制。

title: Optically Switched Phonon Superradiance of Surface Acoustic Wave in Diamond
summary: Surface acoustic wave (SAW) phonon coupling with nitrogen-vacancy (NV) center spins in diamond offers a promising platform for on-chip quantum phononic manipulations. Although an ensemble of NV centers coupled to a common SAW phonon mode enables superradiance and collective quantum control, achieving a tunable superradiant phase transition remains challenging. Here, we show that optically driving NV centers level transitions enhances the effective spin-phonon coupling, triggering a SAW phonon superradiant phase transition in the weak-coupling regime. We also demonstrate that above a critical threshold, the driving light rapidly switches on the phonon superradiance--a dynamic effect that persists in finite-number NV ensembles. Our results provide a controllable route to coherent phonon-NV spin manipulation in solid state quantum devices.

AI.tldr: 本文展示了通过光驱动NV中心能级跃迁，在弱耦合条件下增强自旋-声子耦合，触发SAW声子超辐射相变，并实现了可调控的相干声子-NV自旋操控。
AI.motivation: 实现可调控的SAW声子与NV中心自旋之间的超辐射相变，解决在弱耦合条件下难以达到超辐射相变阈值的难题。
AI.method: 利用光驱动NV中心的能级跃迁来增强有效自旋-声子耦合强度，从而在弱耦合区域触发SAW声子超辐射相变。
AI.result: 在弱耦合条件下成功触发SAW声子超辐射相变，且超过临界阈值后光驱动力可快速开启声子超辐射，该动态效应在有限数量NV体系中依然存在。
AI.conclusion: 为固态量子器件中实现可控的相干声子-NV自旋操控提供了一条可调控的路径。

title: Robust secret storage in networks
summary: The problem of storing secure information on a network is studied. A formal framework for distributed secret storage is introduced, and possible applications in technological and social systems are discussed. The problem is formulated as the optimization of a robustness functional in which two competing requirements are balanced: survivability under network-degrading processes and resistance to adversarial compromise. An exact representation of survivability is derived in terms of minimal information-carrying subgraphs (MICS), which provide a reduced description of the reconstruction events relevant to the stored information. This representation is then used to construct semi-local optimization methods whose dynamics do not require global knowledge of the network structure. Finally, it is shown that, in a limiting case, the robustness functional can be mapped naturally to an effective spin Hamiltonian.

AI.tldr: 本文针对网络安全存储问题，提出了分布式秘密存储的形式化框架，通过平衡网络退化下的存活性与对抗攻击的抵抗力来优化鲁棒性函数，并基于最小信息承载子图（MICS）构建了半局部优化方法，最后展示了鲁棒性函数在极限情况下可映射为有效自旋哈密顿量。
AI.motivation: 现有网络存储方案难以同时兼顾信息在节点失效或网络退化下的存活性，以及抵御恶意节点或外部攻击的安全性，亟需一个能够平衡这两种竞争需求的形式化框架。
AI.method: 首先定义分布式秘密存储的形式化框架；然后基于最小信息承载子图（MICS）导出存活性精确表示；利用该表示构建无需全局网络知识的半局部优化方法；最后在极限情形下将鲁棒性函数映射为有效自旋哈密顿量。
AI.result: 推导出存活性关于MICS的精确表达式；构建了半局部优化动态方法；发现了鲁棒性函数与自旋哈密顿量之间的映射关系。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的框架和半局部方法为分布式秘密存储的鲁棒性优化提供了理论工具，并揭示了与统计物理（自旋系统）的深层联系，对未来技术与社会系统中的安全存储具有指导意义。

title: Silicon-compatible ideal antiferroelectricity with large digital electromechanical responses enabled by thermal-strain domain engineering
summary: Antiferroelectrics exhibit reversible antipolar-polar transformations, offering a compelling platform for multiple functionalities in modern nanoelectronics, yet deterministic control of antiferroelectric domains and switching pathways remain elusive. Moreover, their integration with ubiquitous silicon-based electronic devices has been limited by the structural and chemical incompatibilities of conventional oxide platforms. Here, we convert the conventional drawback of thermal mismatch into a functional advantage and realize ideal antiferroelectricity in epitaxial PbZrO3 thin films on silicon through thermal tensile-strain engineering, a strain regime unattainable on conventional perovskite substrates. Combined theoretical and experimental studies show that tensile strain stabilizes the (004)o domain, enabling a direct one-step switching, whereas compressive-strain-stabilized (240)o domains switch through intermediate ferrielectric states. The resulting films exhibit near-zero remanent polarization, square double hysteresis, nanosecond switching (~75ns), large reversible electrostrain (~0.6%) and robust operation windows. These findings provide key insights into domain-engineered ideal antiferroelectricity on silicon, opening a viable route toward high-performance antiferroelectric nano-electronic devices.

AI.tldr: 本文通过热拉伸应变工程在硅衬底上外延生长PbZrO3薄膜，实现了理想的铁电反铁电性，获得了近零剩余极化、方形双电滞回线、纳秒级开关（~75ns）、大电致应变（~0.6%）等优异性能，为反铁电纳米电子器件提供了新途径。
AI.motivation: 反铁电材料具有可逆的 antipolar-polar 转变，在纳米电子学中有广泛应用前景，但反铁电畴和开关路径的确定性控制尚未实现，且传统氧化物平台与硅基电子器件的结构和化学不兼容性限制了其集成应用。
AI.method: 将传统的热失配劣势转化为功能优势，通过热拉伸应变工程在硅衬底上外延生长PbZrO3薄膜，实现常规钙钛矿衬底无法达到的拉伸应变状态，同时结合理论与实验研究分析不同应变下畴的稳定性和开关路径。
AI.result: 拉伸应变稳定了(004)o畴，实现直接一步开关；压缩应变稳定的(240)o畴通过中间铁电态开关。所得薄膜具有近零剩余极化、方形双电滞回线、~75ns纳秒级开关、~0.6%的大可逆电致应变和稳健的工作窗口。
AI.conclusion: 这些发现为硅上畴工程化理想反铁电性提供了关键见解，开辟了高性能反铁电纳米电子器件的可行路线。

authors: Luis G. G. V. Dias da Silva
title: Density waves in low-pressure bilayer nickelates
summary: The low-pressure phase diagram of La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$ provides an important reference for understanding its pressure-induced high-temperature superconductivity. While the spin-density-wave transition at $T_{\text{SDW}}\approx150$ K is increasingly well established, the origin of the second density-wave transition at $T_{\text{DW}}\approx130$ K has remained unresolved. Here, we perform unrestricted Hartree-Fock calculations to investigate the potential origin of the second transition. {Within the orthorhombic phase, the degeneracy between possible ordering wavevectors at $\boldsymbol{Q}_{Y}=(0,π)$ and at $\boldsymbol{Q}_{X}=(π,0)$ is lifted and the electronic system} develops a double-stripe spin-density wave with ordering vector $\boldsymbol{Q}_{Y}=(0,π)$. We identify that the pure double stripe spin state is unstable in La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$ towards a commensurate charge-density wave instability, which favors a spin-modulated double stripe order with intertwined charge and spin instabilities and establish the hierarchy of ordered states in La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$, providing an important link between its ambient-pressure and superconducting high-pressure phases. We further discuss our results in the context of available experimental literature and propose further experimental tests to elucidate the origin of the SDW/DW states in this system.

AI.tldr: 本文通过无限制Hartree-Fock计算，揭示了La₃Ni₂O₇中第二个密度波转变（~130 K）源于双条纹自旋密度波与电荷密度波的不稳定性耦合，建立了环境压力下有序态与高压超导相之间的联系。
AI.motivation: La₃Ni₂O₇的低压相图对于理解其高压高温超导性至关重要。尽管自旋密度波转变（~150 K）已被广泛认可，但第二个密度波转变（~130 K）的起源尚未解决。
AI.method: 采用无限制Hartree-Fock计算，在正交相中分析有序波矢（Q_Y=(0,π)和Q_X=(π,0)）的简并解除，研究双条纹自旋序的不稳定性及与电荷序的耦合。
AI.result: 正交相中系统选择Q_Y=(0,π)的双条纹自旋密度波；纯双条纹自旋态不稳定，趋于共度电荷密度波不稳定性，形成自旋调制的双条纹序，电荷与自旋不稳定性相互交织。
AI.conclusion: 建立了La₃Ni₂O₇中有序态的层级结构，为常压相与高压超导相之间的联系提供了重要线索，并提出了进一步的实验验证方案。

title: Synchronic scattering and geometric dephasing in microwave-induced resistance oscillations
summary:
We present a novel quantum transport model for microwave-induced resistance oscillations (MIRO) where we prove that the instantaneous scattering rate is directly modulated by the velocity of the driven coherent state. This interaction peaks exactly at $ωt = 2nπ$, where the wave packets sweep through the impurity landscape at maximum speed, breaking time-reversal symmetry to generate a net direct current. Additionally, we introduce a dephasing architecture to explain amplitude saturation: a non-linear geometric dephasing ($\exp(-A/R_c)$) triggered when the displacement amplitude $A$ of the oscillating coherent state,
  approaches the cyclotron radius $R_{c}$. This perfectly captures the linear-to-sublinear power crossover at high intensities, offering a fully coherent description of non-equilibrium transport.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新颖的量子输运模型，证明微波诱导电阻振荡(MIRO)中瞬态散射率被驱动相干态的速度直接调制，并在特定相位峰值处打破时间反演对称性产生净直流；同时引入退相干架构解释幅度饱和，完美捕捉高功率下的线性到次线性交叉行为。
AI.motivation: 现有MIRO理论未能完全解释高功率下的非线性饱和行为，作者试图建立一个完全相干的量子输运模型，统一描述MIRO从低功率到高功率的完整特征。
AI.method: 1) 提出相干态速度调制瞬态散射率的量子输运模型；2) 引入非线性几何退相干机制($\exp(-A/R_c)$)，当位移振幅接近回旋半径时触发退相干；3) 通过模型精确捕捉线性到亚线性的功率交叉行为。
AI.result: 模型成功解释了MIRO在高功率下的幅度饱和现象，完美拟合了线性到次线性的功率交叉行为，为非平衡输运提供了完全相干的描述框架。
AI.conclusion: 该工作通过相干态速度调制和几何退相干机制，为MIRO及非平衡量子输运提供了统一的理论框架，深化了对时间反演对称性破缺和介质散射的物理理解。

title: Estimating Free Energy Differences with Virtually Escorted Trajectories
summary: For a process in which a system is driven irreversibly from equilibrium state $A$ toward equilibrium state $B$, the free energy difference $ΔF = F_B-F_A$ can be estimated using the work fluctuation theorem $\langle e^{-W/T}\rangle = e^{-ΔF/T}$, where $W$ and $T$ denote work and temperature. The estimate often suffers from poor convergence with the number of trajectories used to calculate the average. Borrowing ideas from escorted free energy estimation, and from diffusion models of machine learning, we show how to construct infinitely many work-like quantities, $W_θ$, that satisfy $\langle e^{-W_θ/T}\rangle = e^{-ΔF/T}$, for the same underlying dynamics. Our method involves a virtual control field ${\boldsymbol u}_θ$ that does not modify these dynamics. We show how to choose parameter values $θ$ to optimize convergence of the free energy estimate, for a fixed set of trajectories. We identify conditions under which our method provides a zero-variance estimator of $ΔF$. We use numerical simulations of model systems to illustrate the gains in convergence that our method can achieve.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合 escorted自由能估计和扩散模型的方法，通过构造无限多个满足功涨落定理的类功量 $W_θ$，并引入虚拟控制场来优化自由能差估计的收敛性，在特定条件下可实现零方差估计。
AI.motivation: 传统的功涨落定理在估计自由能差时，由于平均过程收敛缓慢，需要大量轨迹才能获得可靠结果，计算成本高昂。作者希望通过引入额外自由度来加速收敛。
AI.method: 借鉴 escorted自由能估计和机器学习的扩散模型思想，构造无穷多个满足 $\langle e^{-W_θ/T}\rangle = e^{-ΔF/T}$ 的类功量 $W_θ$；引入不改变原始动力学的虚拟控制场 ${\boldsymbol u}_θ$；通过优化参数 $θ$ 来最小化估计方差。
AI.result: 在特定条件下，该方法可以实现零方差估计器；通过模型系统的数值模拟验证了收敛性的显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在保持功涨落定理核心关系不变的前提下，通过参数化类功量显著改善了自由能估计的收敛效率，为不可逆过程中的自由能计算提供了一种高效的改进方案。

title: Multiphysical impedance spectroscopy of porous electrodes based on linear irreversible thermodynamics
summary: Porous electrodes couple electrical, chemical, mechanical, hydraulic, and thermal fields, yet conventional frequency-domain diagnostics interrogate only one of them: electrochemical impedance spectroscopy (EIS) the electrical response and dynamic mechanical analysis (DMA) the mechanical. Each reads a diagonal entry of the multiphysical constitutive matrix and is blind to the cross-couplings that govern structural evolution and degradation. Starting from linear irreversible thermodynamics, we formulate a general theory of multiphysical impedance spectroscopy, in which perturbing one field and measuring the conjugate response of another probes an off-diagonal entry of the constitutive matrix, recovering the static coupling coefficient and resolving its relaxation dynamics across frequency. Specializing to the electro-chemo-mechanical pathway yields a closed-form theory of mechano-electrochemical impedance spectroscopy (MEIS), in which a small harmonic current is applied and the stack stress is measured; the impedance factorizes into a chemical-accumulation term multiplying the sum of a chemo-mechanical and a poro-mechanical kernel. The porosity-accommodation bridge function is derived from a Helmholtz free energy -- following from a microstructural stiffness and viscosity rather than a fitted form -- and a three-phase (solid-fluid-void) closure interpolates continuously between unsaturated and Biot-saturated limits through a void-accommodation fraction. Non-dimensionalization reduces the spectrum to five groups, identifies the phase angle as the discriminator of the chemo-mechanical parameters, and locates the onset of second-quadrant behavior, which in a full cell arises from the competition between an expanding and a contracting electrode. MEIS emerges as one member of a family of cross-coupled spectroscopies the same framework brings within reach.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于线性不可逆热力学的多物理阻抗谱通用理论，专攻电-化-力耦合路径形成力-电化学阻抗谱（MEIS），通过施加小谐波电流并测量堆栈应力，实现了对多物理场交叉耦合系数的频域探测。
AI.motivation: 传统电化学阻抗谱（EIS）和动态力学分析（DMA）各自只探测多物理本构矩阵的对角项，无法感知控制结构演化和退化的交叉耦合效应，因此需要一种能探测非对角项的新谱学方法。
AI.method: 从线性不可逆热力学出发，建立多物理阻抗谱通用框架；针对电-化-力路径，推导出力-电化学阻抗谱（MEIS）的闭合形式理论：施加小谐波电流、测量堆栈应力；阻抗分解为化学累积项乘以化-力与孔-力两个核的加和；孔隙容纳桥函数由Helmholtz自由能导出（基于微观刚度与黏度而非拟合形式），并通过三相（固-液-空）闭合模型在非饱和与Biot饱和极限之间连续插值。
AI.result: 无量纲化将谱图缩减为五个群组，识别出相角是化-力参数的判别器，并定位了第二象限行为的起始点——在全电池中源于膨胀电极与收缩电极之间的竞争。
AI.conclusion: MEIS是一系列交叉耦合谱学中的一员，该框架使得更多跨场耦合谱学方法的开发成为可能。

title: Trimers in the Extended Hubbard Model
summary: The Lieb theorem is a cornerstone of quantum magnetism theory in condensed matter. In this work, we investigate the instability of the Lieb insulating ferrimagnetic phase in the extended Hubbard model on a trimer chain at half-filling, with one electron per site, under increasing the nearest-neighbor Coulomb coupling $V$. Our results show that despite a noticeable increase in doublon density with $V$, the ferrimagnetic insulating phase remains robust up to the phase separation (PS) line, which is observed at $V \gtrsim U/4$, where $U$ is the local Coulomb repulsion. Above the PS line, one of the coexisting phases is primarily populated by doublons on one of the two sublattices of the chain. This phase coexists with a metallic, unsaturated ferromagnetic phase for $U \gtrsim t$, and with a singlet phase for $U \lesssim t$, where $t$ is the intra-trimer hopping amplitude. We estimate the PS and the crossover lines with the help of density matrix renormalization group calculations.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了三聚体链上扩展Hubbard模型的Lieb绝缘亚铁磁相在最近邻库仑耦合V增加下的不稳定性。发现亚铁磁绝缘相在V≲U/4时保持稳定，超过此值发生相分离，出现双占位主导相与金属不饱和铁磁相（U≳t）或单态相（U≲t）共存。
AI.motivation: 探究Lieb定理所预言的亚铁磁绝缘相在最近邻库仑相互作用增强时的稳定性边界，揭示该相在多大相互作用下失稳以及失稳后的新物理现象。
AI.method: 采用密度矩阵重正化群(DMRG)数值计算方法，对半填充三聚体链上的扩展Hubbard模型进行精确计算，分析双占位密度、磁序等物理量随V的变化。
AI.result: 亚铁磁绝缘相在V≲U/4时保持稳定；在V≳U/4处发生相分离；相分离后，U≳t时出现双占位相与金属不饱和铁磁相共存，U≲t时出现双占位相与单态相共存。
AI.conclusion: Lieb亚铁磁绝缘相具有相当的鲁棒性，但其失稳机制及后续共存相的物理性质依赖于U/t参数，揭示了强关联电子系统中相互作用竞争导致的丰富相图。

title: Electron Delocalization versus Emission Coherence of Quantum Dot Superlattices
summary: Cooperative emission is a collective quantum optical process that requires macroscopic phase coherence among coupled emitters. Recent observations of cooperative emission in QD superlattices have renewed interest in how such coherence emerges in nanostructured solids. Meanwhile, theoretical studies have long discussed the relationship between electronic delocalization and coherence, particularly whether delocalized states necessarily give rise to cooperative emission. This study addresses this question through power-dependent steady-state PL and time-resolved PL decay measurements. The findings indicate that, although the quantum resonance peak exhibits delocalized excitonic characteristics, it shows no signatures of cooperative radiation. In particular, neither superlinear intensity scaling nor power-dependent emission delay was observed, indicating the absence of cooperative-radiation signatures. This can be understood from two disorder-related aspects. Temperature-dependent spectroscopy reveals pronounced inhomogeneous broadening and low-temperature dark-exciton participation, pointing to intra-domain static disorder and exciton-state mixing. These effects collectively hinder the establishment of macroscopic coherence. The temperature dependence of the quantum resonance peak decay lifetime is consistent with two-dimensional exciton dynamics. This work provides direct experimental evidence that electronic delocalization can be decoupled from cooperative coherence in CdSe quantum dot superlattices.

AI.tldr: 本文通过稳态和时间分辨光致发光测量，证明了CdSe量子点超晶格中电子离域与协同辐射相干性可以解耦——尽管存在离域激子特征，但未观察到协同辐射的超线性强度标度或功率依赖的发射延迟。
AI.motivation: 量子点超晶格中协同发射的观测重新激发了人们对纳米结构固体中相干性如何产生的兴趣。理论长期讨论电子离域与相干性之间的关系，特别是离域态是否必然产生协同辐射，本文旨在通过实验回答这一开放问题。
AI.method: 采用功率依赖的稳态光致发光（PL）和时间分辨PL衰减测量，结合变温光谱分析，研究CdSe量子点超晶格的光学性质。
AI.result: 量子共振峰表现出离域激子特征，但未观察到协同辐射的迹象：既无超线性强度标度，也无功率依赖的发射延迟。变温光谱揭示出显著的非均匀展宽和低温暗激子参与，表明域内静态无序和激子态混合阻碍了宏观相干性的建立。量子共振峰衰减寿命的温度依赖性符合二维激子动力学。
AI.conclusion: 这项工作提供了直接的实验证据，表明在CdSe量子点超晶格中，电子离域可以与协同相干性解耦，两者并非必然共存。

title: A Field-Theoretic Framework for Work Statistics and Universal Scaling in Non-equilibrium Phase Transitions
summary: We develop a field-theoretic framework for work statistics in $O(N)$ models driven through criticality. By analyzing the dynamic renormalization group flow of composite power operators, we find the Kibble-Zurek scaling laws as a natural consequence of the flow, and we derive the scaling of work cumulants relevant to Kibble-Zurek scaling of topological defects from first principles, bypassing heuristic freeze-out argument. This yields the universal scaling $c_n \sim τ_Q^{-α_n}$ for the $n$-th work cumulant density: isolated quantum systems exhibit a scaling of $α_n = p(d+nz)ν/(1+pzν)$, whereas open quantum and classical systems undergo a dimensional collapse to $α_n = pdν/(1+pzν)$. Validated by exact Gaussian solutions and numerical simulations, our theory establishes a foundation for general work statistics far from equilibrium, thereby bridging stochastic thermodynamics and the renormalization group theory.

AI.tldr: 本文发展了一套场论框架，用于分析O(N)模型在穿越临界点时的功统计量。通过动力学期望化群流，导出了Kibble-Zurek标度律，并从第一性原理推导了功累积量的标度指数，跳过了传统的启发式冻结论证。结果发现孤立量子系统与开放量子/经典系统具有不同的标度指数，并通过精确高斯解和数值模拟验证，为远离平衡的功统计学建立了基础。
AI.motivation: 现有Kibble-Zurek机制依赖启发式冻结论证，缺乏第一性原理推导，且功统计量的通用标度理论尚未建立。作者希望用场论和重整化群方法严格推导功累积量的普适标度行为。
AI.method: 利用场论框架分析O(N)模型穿越临界点的动力学，通过复合幂算子的动力量纲化群流，推导Kibble-Zurek标度律。分别处理孤立量子系统和开放系统（包括经典系统），得到不同的维数约化效应。
AI.result: 推导出第n阶功累积量密度的普适标度律c_n ~ τ_Q^{-α_n}。孤立量子系统：α_n = p(d+nz)ν/(1+pzν)；开放量子/经典系统：α_n = pdν/(1+pzν)，出现维数约化。精确高斯解和数值模拟验证了理论预测。
AI.conclusion: 建立了从第一性原理出发的功统计量严格标度理论，桥接了随机热力学与重整化群理论，为远离平衡态的普适临界动力学提供了统一框架。

title: Probing Quantum Geometric Phases via Scanning Tunneling Microscopy
summary: The quantum geometric phase intrinsically dictates the geometry, topology, and many-body correlations of electronic wave functions. While quantum geometric phases are conventionally inferred through momentum-space probes or macroscopic transport measurements, their direct visualization and quantification in real space have historically been restricted by the spatial averaging of bulk techniques. Scanning tunneling microscopy and spectroscopy (STM/STS) circumvent this limitation, leveraging atomic-scale spatial resolution and high energy sensitivity to resolve local electronic phase profiles directly. This review highlights recent progress across four representative methodologies: probing the Aharonov-Bohm (AB) geometric phase via nanoscale real space interferometry; extracting the Berry phase from defect-induced quasiparticle interference and wavefront dislocations; reconstructing the complex phase structure in symmetric systems, such as magic-angle graphene, using order parameter decomposition; and mapping the phase textures and topological defects of pair density wave (PDW) and charge density wave (CDW) in unconventional superconductors utilizing the numerical 2D lock-in technique. Together, these developments show how quantum phases can be translated onto real space and locally resolvable observables. Phase-resolved STM imaging provides stringent constraints on topological states of matter, symmetry-breaking patterns, and strong electronic correlations, outlining a robust framework for in situ phase engineering in quantum materials.

AI.tldr: 本文综述了利用扫描隧道显微镜/扫描隧道谱（STM/STS）在实空间直接观测和量化量子几何相位的最新进展，涵盖四种代表性方法：纳米实空间干涉测量Aharonov-Bohm相位、从缺陷诱导的准粒子干涉中提取Berry相位、对称系统（如魔角石墨烯）中的复相位结构重建，以及非常规超导体中配对密度波和电荷密度波的相位纹理与拓扑缺陷映射。
AI.motivation: 传统的量子几何相位推断依赖于动量空间探针或宏观输运测量，受限于体技术的空间平均效应，无法在实空间直接可视化。STM/STS凭借原子级空间分辨率和能量灵敏度，突破了这一限制，使实空间相位直接测量成为可能。
AI.method: 综述了四种代表性方法：(1) 纳米实空间干涉测量Aharonov-Bohm几何相位；(2) 从缺陷诱导的准粒子干涉和波前位错中提取Berry相位；(3) 利用序参量分解重构对称系统（如魔角石墨烯）的复相位结构；(4) 采用数值二维锁相技术绘制非常规超导体中PDW和CDW的相位纹理与拓扑缺陷。
AI.result: 展示了量子相位可以转化为实空间和局域可观测量的方法。相位分辨的STM成像为拓扑物态、对称性破缺模式和强电子关联提供了严格约束。
AI.conclusion: 这些进展为量子材料中原位相位工程提供了一个鲁棒的框架，使实空间量子几何相位研究成为可能。

title: Strain-Driven Domain Walls in Antiferromagnets
summary: We derive an equation describing domain wall motion in antiferromagnets under the influence of normal strain. From this equation, we find that the domain wall moves towards positions where $\varepsilon_{xx}$ is high and $\varepsilon_{zz}$ is low. Furthermore, each strain component leads to a different terminal velocity for the same strain profile. This difference arises because both strains affect the domain wall width in opposite ways: $\varepsilon_{xx}$ reduces the width, whereas $\varepsilon_{zz}$ increases it. The model is then compared with mumax$^+$ simulations for various strain profiles, including a strain gradient, an oscillating strain, and a Rayleigh wave. The comparison shows good agreement between the analytical and numerical results. Finally, we demonstrate the potential of standing surface acoustic waves as an error correction method in racetrack memory.

AI.tldr: 本文推导了反铁磁体中法向应变驱动畴壁运动的方程，发现畴壁向高εxx和低εzz区域移动，两种应变对畴壁宽度的影响相反，并与mumax⁺模拟结果吻合良好，最后展示了驻表面声波在赛道存储器纠错中的应用潜力。
AI.motivation: 研究法向应变对反铁磁体畴壁运动的影响，探索利用应变调控畴壁运动的物理机制，并为赛道存储器的纠错方法提供新思路。
AI.method: 推导描述反铁磁体畴壁在法向应变作用下运动的方程，分析εxx和εzz对应变宽度的影响，并与mumax⁺微磁模拟结果进行对比验证。
AI.result: 畴壁向高εxx和低εzz区域移动；εxx减小畴壁宽度，εzz增加宽度；不同应变分量导致不同的终端速度；解析结果与模拟结果高度一致。
AI.conclusion: 揭示法向应变调控反铁磁畴壁运动的物理机制，并证明驻表面声波可用于赛道存储器的纠错，为应变驱动的自旋电子学器件提供理论支持。

title: Learning Inhomogeneous Heisenberg Hamiltonians in Nanographene Spin Chains
summary: Inferring microscopic Hamiltonians from experimental data is a central challenge in quantum materials and quantum simulation. In low-dimensional spin systems, exchange interactions are often assumed to be spatially uniform, despite structural and environmental inhomogeneities that can locally modify the coupling. Here, we leverage a local, length-independent machine learning methodology to reconstruct spatially modulated exchange interactions directly from inelastic scanning tunneling spectroscopy maps. We demonstrate this approach with nanographene spin chains, identifying both near-uniform and inhomogeneous regimes across the synthesized magnets. The reconstructed models quantitatively reproduce the experimental spectra and recover the correct scaling of the excitation gap with system size. Our results establish a general strategy to bridge local spectroscopic measurements with effective many-body Hamiltonians.

AI.tldr: 本文利用基于局部、长度无关的机器学习方法，直接从非弹性扫描隧道谱图中重建纳米石墨烯自旋链的空间调制交换相互作用，成功识别了均匀与非均匀耦合区域，并定量复现了实验光谱和激发隙的尺寸标度。
AI.motivation: 从实验数据推断微观哈密顿量是量子材料与量子模拟的核心挑战。在低维自旋系统中，交换相互作用常被假设为空间均匀的，但结构和环境不均匀性会局部改变耦合，现有方法无法解决这一矛盾。
AI.method: 利用局部、与长度无关的机器学习方法，从非弹性扫描隧道谱（ISTS）图中直接重建空间调制的交换相互作用，应用于纳米石墨烯自旋链。
AI.result: 成功识别了纳米石墨烯自旋链中的均匀与非均匀耦合区域；重建模型定量复现了实验光谱，并恢复了激发隙随系统尺寸的正确标度关系。
AI.conclusion: 该工作建立了一种通用策略，将局部光谱测量与有效多体哈密顿量联系起来，为从实验数据反演复杂量子材料中的微观相互作用提供了新范式。

title: Why can genetic algorithms work in high-dimensional search spaces?
summary: We show that the effective dynamics of the elitist $(1+M)$ genetic algorithm is, in the limit of small mutations, clipped gradient descent on the loss in the presence of anisotropic Gaussian white noise. In expectation, therefore, a simple mutation-selection genetic algorithm follows the gradient of the loss, without explicit calculation of gradients and without averaging over loss evaluations. The genetic algorithm is slower than gradient descent because of the noise that acts in directions transverse to the gradient. However, this slowdown is controlled not by the number of parameters of the search space but by the effective rank of the Hessian of the loss function. For the concentrated Hessian spectra observed in neural-network loss functions the effective rank can be far smaller than the number of parameters, which may explain why genetic algorithms can scale to large search spaces.

AI.tldr: 本文证明精英(1+M)遗传算法在小突变极限下等价于带各向异性高斯白噪声的裁剪梯度下降，其期望行为遵循损失函数的梯度，且噪声导致的减速由Hessian有效秩而非参数数量控制，解释了遗传算法在大搜索空间中的可扩展性。
AI.motivation: 探索遗传算法为何能在无需显式计算梯度的情况下有效优化大规模参数空间（如神经网络），揭示其底层动力学机制与梯度下降的关系。
AI.method: 理论分析精英(1+M)遗传算法在小突变极限下的有效动力学，证明其等价于带各向异性高斯白噪声的裁剪梯度下降。
AI.result: 遗传算法期望上遵循损失梯度方向；噪声减速由Hessian有效秩控制而非参数总数；对于神经网络损失函数（聚集的Hessian谱），有效秩远小于参数数量。
AI.conclusion: 该理论解释了遗传算法可扩展至大搜索空间的原因——减速因子依赖于Hessian有效秩而非参数维度，而神经网络的Hessian谱恰好具有集中的特性。

title: Bilinear Flexo-Antiferrodistortive Coupling in Ferroelastics: Polar Twins, Antiphase Boundaries and Fingerprints of Alterelectricity
comment: 21 pages, including 4 figures and Supplementary Materials
summary: Using the Landau-Ginsburg-Devonshire approach we show that the linear gradient-type coupling between the electric polarization vector and antiferrodistortive long-range order parameter pseudovector, that has the form of Lifshitz invariant and named "bilinear flexo-antiferrodistortive coupling", can emerge in all antiferrodistortive ferroelastics, since it is symmetry-allowed.
