Using the four sublattices model we reveal that the bilinear flexo-antiferrodistortive coupling can induce the sublattice-sensitive polarization at the twin walls and antiphase boundaries in antiferrodistortive ferroelastics without any ferroelectric or antiferroelectric ordering. Since the induced polarization is perpendicular to the antiferrodistortive long-range order parameter and counter-directed in neighboring sublattices with checkerboard-type direction of antiferrodistortive long-range order parameter, such structure of polarization may correspond to the alterelectric-type quadrupolar electric order. However, physical manifestations of the bilinear flexo-antiferrodistortive coupling are invisible in most nanostructured antiferrodistortive ferroelectrics and antiferroelectrics due to the domination of piezoelectric and/or linear flexoelectric couplings. Since a common flexoelectric coupling cannot induce the alterelectric-type polarization at domain boundaries in antiferrodistortive ferroelastics, we believe that the bilinear flexo-antiferrodistortive coupling can be a fingerprint of recently discovered alterelectric long-range order in antiferrodistortive ferroelastics.

AI.tldr: 本文通过Landau-Ginsburg-Devonshire方法证明，反铁畸变铁弹体中存在一种线性梯度型耦合（双线性挠性-反铁畸变耦合），可在畴壁处诱导出亚晶格敏感的极化，形成类似交替电型的四极电序，并可作为区分反铁畸变铁弹体中交替电长程序的特征信号。
AI.motivation: 探索反铁畸变铁弹体中可能存在的线性梯度型耦合（双线性挠性-反铁畸变耦合），以及这种耦合能否在没有铁电或反铁电序的情况下诱导出极化，从而揭示新的电序类型。
AI.method: 采用Landau-Ginsburg-Devonshire理论分析对称性允许的耦合形式，并利用四子格模型揭示耦合对畴壁处极化的诱导机制。
AI.result: 1) 双线性挠性-反铁畸变耦合在所有反铁畸变铁弹体中对称性允许；2) 该耦合可在孪晶壁和反相边界处诱导出垂直于反铁畸变序参量、且相邻子格方向相反的极化，对应交替电型四极电序；3) 该效应在纳米结构材料中被压电/线性挠电耦合掩盖，但在反铁畸变铁弹体中可作为交替电序的特征信号。
AI.conclusion: 双线性挠性-反铁畸变耦合是反铁畸变铁弹体中交替电长程序的独特指纹，对理解新型电序具有重要意义。

title: Ferromagnetic ordering in Hubbard models
summary:
One of the long-standing and only partially solved problems of theoretical condensed matter physics and mathematical physics is to demonstrate that ground states of some of the versions of the Hubbard model can exhibit a ferromagnetic ordering. It has long been speculated that the opportunity crucial for the occurrence of ferromagnetism is the structure of the lattice on which the Hubbard model is formulated \cite{TasakiMB}. As a consequence, while on simple cubic lattices no ferromagnetic ordering seems to be possible, it can naturally arise, even for low densities of magnetic moment carriers, on so-called frustrated lattices.
  We investigate the problem of ground state ferromagnetic ordering with the use of the formula for ground-state energy of interacting fermions as the first term of `density expansion', proven rigorously by Lieb, Seiringer and Solovej \cite{fermi exact} in continuum and by Giuliani \cite{hub exact} for the simple cubic lattice. Assuming that analogous expansion holds also for certain another lattices we apply this formula to five frustrated lattices -- among them to the face-centered cubic one. The hypothesis is confirmed: most of examined models formulated on frustrated lattices do indeed have ferromagnetic ground states already for densities being moderate or even low. Although the approach adopted cannot be treated as a rigorous proof that the ground state is ferromagnetic, the results obtained here strongly indicate that it can be the case. Moreover, as in some cases FM occurs at low densities, one can hope that it would be possible to prove convergence of the density expansion and prove rigorously the occurrence of `wealthy ferromagnetism' in these cases.

AI.tldr: 本文通过密度展开公式研究 Hubbard 模型在五种受挫晶格上的基态铁磁序，发现多数模型在中等或低密度下确实存在铁磁基态，为理解晶格结构对铁磁性的作用提供了有力证据。
AI.motivation: 凝聚态物理中长期未完全解决的问题之一：证明某些 Hubbard 模型版本的基态能表现出铁磁序。已有推测认为晶格结构（尤其是受挫晶格）是关键因素。
AI.method: 利用 Lieb、Seiringer 和 Solovej 在连续情形以及 Giuliani 在简立方晶格上严格证明的相互作用费米子基态能量密度展开公式，将其推广到五种受挫晶格（包括面心立方晶格），分析铁磁基态是否存在。
AI.result: 在大多数受挫晶格模型上，即使在中等或低密度下，基态也表现出铁磁序。
AI.conclusion: 虽然该方法的结论不能视为严格证明，但结果强烈表明受挫晶格上的 Hubbard 模型基态可以呈现铁磁性。在低密度情形下，有望严格证明密度展开的收敛性，从而严格证明"富铁磁性"的存在。

title: Emergent energy scales in magnonic systems with relative motion
summary: Relative motion between interacting systems can generate emergent energy scales that are absent in isolated systems. While uniform motion can be eliminated by a Galilean transformation, relative motion between interacting systems generally cannot. In the presence of characteristic spatial structures, relative motion gives rise to a Doppler frequency scale determined by the characteristic wavevector of the excitation and the relative velocity of the system. This emergent scale provides a fundamental mechanism for driving nonequilibrium phenomena in moving systems. In particular, the emergent energy scale is determined by how the relative motion probes the spatial structure of the relevant excitation. In this tutorial, we illustrate these ideas using magnonic systems as a concrete platform. We first discuss motion-induced magnon transport between relatively moving ferromagnets, in which the Doppler frequency serves as an effective nonequilibrium bias in the perturbative regime. This mechanism produces magnon currents even in the absence of conventional driving forces such as temperature gradients or chemical potential differences. We then introduce motion-induced parametric instabilities. When the emergent scale becomes sufficiently large to resonantly create magnon pairs, the perturbative description breaks down, and the magnonic vacuum becomes unstable. Above a critical velocity threshold, spontaneous magnon-pair creation emerges, resulting in strongly enhanced transport and nonequilibrium dynamics. Connections to related phenomena, including quantum friction, Cherenkov emission, and Zeldovich superradiance, are also highlighted. The concept of an emergent energy scale provides a unifying framework for understanding transport phenomena and instabilities in quantum systems with relative motion.

AI.tldr: 本文系统阐述了相对运动通过多普勒效应产生涌现能量标度的机制，并以磁振子系统为例，展示了这一机制如何驱动非平衡输运和参量不稳定性，为理解量子系统中的运动诱导现象提供了统一框架。
AI.motivation: 相对运动在相互作用系统中无法通过伽利略变换消除，会产生新的能量标度。理解这一机制对揭示运动诱导的非平衡现象至关重要，但目前缺乏统一的理论框架。
AI.method: 以磁振子系统为具体平台，通过多普勒频率尺度分析运动诱导的磁振子输运（微扰区域）和参量不稳定性（非微扰区域），并关联量子摩擦、切伦科夫辐射、Zeldovich超辐射等现象。
AI.result: 在微扰区域，多普勒频率充当有效非平衡偏压，可在无温度梯度或化学势差下驱动磁振子流；当速度超过临界阈值时，涌现能量标度大到可共振产生磁振子对，导致真空不稳定和自发粒子对产生，极大增强输运。
AI.conclusion: 涌现能量标度为理解相对运动中量子系统的输运现象和不稳定性提供了统一框架，揭示了运动效应对非平衡动力学的根本性作用。

title: Optimizing Expert-Designed Crystal Graph Networks for Band-Gap Prediction with an Autonomous LLM Research Loop
summary: Predicting a material's properties from its structure is a central, fast-advancing problem in computational materials science. A decade of work has produced standard public benchmarks and many published machine-learning models for the task (Dunn et al., 2020). The task's fixed metric and these baselines make it a natural setting for autonomous agent research (Karpathy, 2026). On the MatBench band-gap benchmark ($>$100k crystals), a general-purpose coding agent autonomously built the most accurate model trained without external pretraining, ahead of all seventeen expert-designed models reported for the task. A closer analysis shows it reached this by implementing known methods: either already standard in crystal neural-network models, or borrowed from other areas of machine learning. The contributing implementations include element-pair features on each message-passing edge and a crystal space-group embedding. The work not only demonstrates that LLM-agent autonomous research can optimize an expert-designed machine learning model for material property prediction, but also investigates the limitations of such autonomous research.

AI.tldr: 一个通用编码AI智能体在MatBench带隙基准测试中，无需外部预训练，自主构建了超越17个专家设计模型的最准确模型，通过实现已知方法（元素对特征和空间群嵌入）达到了最优表现。
AI.motivation: 材料性能预测是计算材料学的核心问题，已有标准基准和大量机器学习模型，但该任务固定指标的特性使其成为自主智能体研究的自然场景，探索LLM智能体能否自主优化专家设计的模型。
AI.method: 使用通用编码AI智能体自主构建模型，在MatBench带隙基准（>10万晶体）上训练，实现了元素对特征的消息传递边特征和晶体空间群嵌入等已知方法。
AI.result: 自主构建的模型超越了所有17个专家设计的模型，成为该基准上无需外部预训练的最准确模型。
AI.conclusion: 证明了LLM智能体自主研究能够优化专家设计的材料性能预测模型，同时也探讨了这种自主研究的局限性。

title: Quantum Theory of Current-Generating Local Orbital Magnetization
summary: Local orbital magnetization is the field whose rotation generates the equilibrium current density. Unlike spin magnetization, a quantum-mechanical local formula consistent with both this current relation and the modern theory of bulk orbital magnetization has been missing. In this work, we derive a quantum-mechanical formula for the local orbital magnetization for non-interacting electrons by considering local-flux response of the grand potential. The local-flux response fixes the formula uniquely in two dimensions, whereas in three dimensions it selects a natural representative within a longitudinal ambiguity. Furthermore, coarse graining yields a natural local marker that generates the current to third-derivative order, and its site-position moment equals the orbital magnetic quadrupole moment of finite-size systems. We illustrate the obtained results with the Haldane model.

AI.tldr: 本文推导了非相互作用电子体系中局域轨道磁化的量子力学公式，通过局域通量响应方法解决了与电流密度关系和现代体轨道磁化理论的自洽性问题，并在Haldane模型中进行了验证。
AI.motivation: 现有的局域轨道磁化公式无法同时满足与平衡电流密度的旋度关系以及现代体轨道磁化理论，缺失一个自洽的量子力学局域表达式。
AI.method: 通过考虑巨势的局域通量响应（local-flux response）来推导局域轨道磁化的量子力学公式。
AI.result: 在二维体系中公式唯一确定；三维体系中在纵向模糊度内选择了一个自然代表；粗粒化后得到产生三阶导数阶电流的自然局域标记；其位点位置矩等于有限尺寸体系的轨道磁四极矩。
AI.conclusion: 提出的局域轨道磁化公式与电流关系及现代体轨道磁化理论自洽，并在Haldane模型中得到验证。

title: Atomically Thin Amorphous Carbon with an Ultralow Dielectric Constant
summary: Two-dimensional (2D) materials exhibit excellent properties at monolayer thickness and are viable replacements for various microelectronic components as scaling gradually approaches the atomic limit. Despite significant advancements in the ongoing 2D revolution of integrated circuits, one crucial building block, namely a 2D ultralow-k (ULK) dielectric, remains unreported. The challenge lies in achieving a dielectric constant less than 3, as traditional low-k dielectrics are inherently unstable at the 2D limit due to their amorphous or porous nature. The realisation of ultrathin dielectrics with low-k is also needed to address current bottlenecks in integrated circuits scaling. Specifically, low-k materials are necessary to minimise parasitic capacitances as the distance between conductive elements shrinks below 10 nm. Moreover, advanced architectures like gate-all-around field effect transistors (GAA FET) require even lower dielectric constants (k<2) at sub-3nm thickness. Here, we show that layer-by-layer grown multilayer amorphous carbon (ML-AC), as thin as 0.8 nm, is a mechanically robust 2D ULK dielectric with k of 1.35 and dielectric strength of 28-31 MV cm-1. The lack of any long-range order, its intrinsic 2D nature, sp2 carbon character and low density are all essential for minimising dielectric permittivity. Moreover, ML-AC overcomes the vulnerability of existing dielectrics to ion diffusion degradation with a record metal ion diffusion time to failure (TTF) of 10^10 s for even a single layer. Therefore, otherwise necessary additional layers occupying up to 3 nm can be eliminated, which is especially significant as metal line widths approach 10 nm. Combined with its low-temperature, direct and conformal growth even on a dielectric, these critical features enable substantial improvements in silicon-based semiconductor electronics and ensure compatibility with future 2D electronics.

AI.tldr: 本文报道了一种多层非晶碳（ML-AC）作为二维超低k介电材料，在0.8 nm厚度下实现了k=1.35的超低介电常数和28-31 MV cm⁻¹的介电强度，解决了集成电路缩放中二维超低k介电材料缺失的关键瓶颈。
AI.motivation: 随着集成电路缩放逼近原子极限，传统低k介电材料在二维极限下不稳定（非晶或多孔性质），且现有材料无法满足栅极全环绕场效应晶体管等先进架构对亚3nm厚度下k<2的需求，亟需开发稳定的二维超低k介电材料。
AI.method: 采用逐层生长的多层非晶碳（ML-AC），利用其缺乏长程有序性、固有的二维特性、sp²碳特性和低密度来最小化介电常数。
AI.result: ML-AC在0.8 nm厚度下实现k=1.35的超低介电常数、28-31 MV cm⁻¹的介电强度，以及单层金属离子扩散失效时间达10¹⁰秒的纪录，克服了离子扩散降解问题。
AI.conclusion: ML-AC作为机械稳健的二维超低k介电材料，可在低温下直接共形生长，消除了传统上多达3 nm的额外阻挡层需求，对硅基半导体电子学和未来二维电子学均具有重要兼容性。

title: The substitutional atomic distance model for predicting lattice thermal conductivity in alloys
summary: Understanding phonon transport in alloys is crucial for the design of high-performance electronic and thermoelectric devices. However, conventional theoretical models fail to provide a clear physical picture of phonon scattering caused by atomic disorder in alloys, and their prediction accuracy is limited. In this work, a new substitutional atomic distance model for alloys is proposed, providing an intuitive physical picture. SiGe and InGaAs alloys are taken as representative systems, and their thermal conductivities are calculated, showing good agreement with previous experimental measurements. The results indicate that alloy scattering plays a dominant role in reducing thermal conductivity. This study provides new insights into phonon transport in alloys and offers guidance for tailoring thermal properties through compositional engineering.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的合金替代原子距离模型，以S iGe和InGaAs合金为例，准确预测了热导率，揭示了合金散射在降低热导率中的主导作用，为通过组分工程调控热性能提供了新见解。
AI.motivation: 传统理论模型无法清晰描述合金中原子无序引起的声子散射物理图像，且预测精度有限，因此需要建立更直观、更准确的模型来理解合金中的声子输运。
AI.method: 提出了一种新的替代原子距离模型，以SiGe和InGaAs合金作为代表性体系，计算其热导率并与实验测量结果进行对比验证。
AI.result: 新模型计算的热导率与先前实验测量结果吻合良好，表明合金散射在降低热导率中起主导作用。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为理解合金中的声子输运提供了新见解，并为通过组分工程调控热性能提供了指导。

title: Length--Velocity Gauge Equivalence of Quantum Geometric Nonlinear Conductivity
comment: The manuscript contains 8 pages of main text with 2 figures, plus 14 pages of appendices
summary: Nonlinear transport has emerged as a sensitive probe of quantum geometry beyond the Berry-curvature physics of linear response. However, the intrinsic second-order dc response remains conceptually subtle: different quantum and semiclassical formulations can appear to give different static limits, with different assignments of Fermi sea and Fermi surface contributions. Here we resolve this ambiguity by developing a gauge-consistent density-matrix theory of intrinsic nonlinear conductivity in both the length gauge, where the electric field couples through the position operator, and the velocity gauge, where it enters through the vector potential. We show that the two gauges give the same adiabatic dc response when the same retarded continuation is used for all external frequencies and when the velocity gauge current includes all field-dependent vertices. The apparent Fermi sea terms cancel in the full expression, leaving a Fermi surface quantum geometric contribution determined by the band-normalized quantum metric. This result implies that a fully gapped insulator has no residual dc nonlinear Hall current in the adiabatic clean limit. The reactive part of the Fermi surface term agrees with the original semiclassical Berry-connection-polarizability response, while the dissipative Ohmic sector requires a more careful treatment of relaxation and impurity scattering. Our work establishes the length-velocity gauge equivalence for quantum geometric nonlinear response and provides a foundation for using nonlinear transport to probe magnetic quantum geometry, especially in PT-symmetric antiferromagnets.

AI.tldr: 本文通过密度矩阵理论解决了本征二阶非线性直流响应中长度规范和速度规范之间的表观不一致性，证明两种规范在相同延迟解析延拓和包含所有场相关顶点时给出相同的绝热直流响应。最终费米海项完全抵消，留下由能带归一化量子度量决定的费米面量子几何贡献，完全带隙绝缘体在绝热干净极限下无残余非线性直流霍尔电流。
AI.motivation: 非线性输运已成为探测超越贝里曲率物理的量子几何的灵敏探针，但本征二阶直流响应在不同量子/半经典表述中可能出现不同的静态极限，费米海和费米面贡献的分配存在歧义，需要统一的理论框架来解决这一概念性难题。
AI.method: 建立了规范一致的密度矩阵理论，分别在长度规范（电场通过位置算符耦合）和速度规范（通过矢势耦合）下推导本征非线性电导率，并系统比较两种规范下的绝热直流响应。
AI.result: 两种规范在相同延迟解析延拓和包含所有场相关顶点时给出一致的绝热直流响应；表观费米海项在完整表达式中抵消；剩余贡献为费米面量子几何项，由能带归一化量子度量决定；完全带隙绝缘体在绝热干净极限下无残余非线性直流霍尔电流。
AI.conclusion: 建立了长度-速度规范等价性用于量子几何非线性响应，为利用非线性输运探测磁量子几何（尤其是PT对称反铁磁体）提供了理论基础。

title: Ferron Hall effect: Transverse accumulation of polarization driven by thermal gradients in ferroelectrics
summary: The phonon Hall effect describes the generation of a transverse heat current in response to a longitudinal thermal gradient in a magnetic field. Here, we theoretically demonstrate that, when the lattice excitations deflected by the Hall effect carry electric dipole moments, their transverse motion produces an accumulation of electric polarization in ferroelectric materials. This accumulation is driven by lattice excitations that carry polarization, known as ferrons, and we therefore call the mechanism the ferron Hall effect. Using atomistic lattice dynamics with parameters obtained from density functional theory, we illustrate the effect in the prototypical ferroelectric BaTiO3. Our results identify ferrons as the electric-polarization analogues of magnons in transverse transport and provide a route toward thermal and magnetic manipulation of ferroic order.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了"铁龙霍尔效应"（ferron Hall effect），即在铁电材料中，携带电极化偶极矩的晶格激发（铁龙）在霍尔效应作用下发生横向运动，从而产生电极化积累。通过第一性原理计算，在BaTiO₃中验证了这一效应，为热学和磁学调控铁电序提供了新途径。
AI.motivation: 将声子霍尔效应的概念拓展到铁电材料中，探索晶格激发携带电极化时的横向输运行为，揭示铁龙作为电极化载体在霍尔效应中的作用机制。
AI.method: 基于密度泛函理论（DFT）获取参数，采用原子级晶格动力学方法，计算铁电材料BaTiO₃中铁龙霍尔效应的表现。
AI.result: 在BaTiO₃中验证了铁龙霍尔效应的存在，证明了携带电极化的晶格激发（铁龙）在横向输运中可积累电极化。
AI.conclusion: 铁龙是电极化意义上的磁振子（magnons）类比物，为通过热和磁手段调控铁电序提供了理论基础。

title: Spin-1 Dirac dispersion and Chern insulating phases in 2D honeycomb Sierpiński fractal
summary: Graphene-based Sierpiński fractals host a zero-energy chiral mode and spin-1 Dirac dispersions within the nearest-neighbor tight-binding model. However, the presence of complex next-nearest neighbor hopping arising from the local flux and the staggered Semenoff mass terms, modeled within the Haldane Hamiltonian, breaks the time-reversal and spatial inversion symmetries, respectively, and makes these flat bands dispersive. Moreover, they introduce rich topological phases in this class of systems that can be characterized by Chern numbers up to $\pm 3$, i.e., beyond the conventional honeycomb lattice. These observations pave the way for the exploration of 2D periodic fractals beyond graphene, where topological phase transitions can be realized through externally applied fields.

AI.tldr: 本文研究石墨烯基Sierpiński分形结构中的电子性质，发现在Haldane模型下（考虑次近邻跳变和Semennoff质量项），系统出现手性零能模和自旋-1狄拉克色散，并产生高达±3的陈数拓扑相，超越了传统蜂窝晶格。
AI.motivation: 探索二维周期分形结构中超越传统石墨烯的拓扑物态，揭示在时间反演和空间反演对称性破缺条件下新奇的拓扑相变。
AI.method: 采用Haldane哈密顿量建模，在石墨烯基Sierpiński分形结构上引入次近邻跳变（局域磁通）和交错Semennoff质量项，使用紧束缚模型计算能带结构和陈数。
AI.result: 发现零能手性模和自旋-1狄拉克色散；平带变得色散；系统出现陈数高达±3的丰富拓扑相，超越蜂窝晶格的拓扑相。
AI.conclusion: 这些发现为在石墨烯之外的二维周期分形中通过外场实现拓扑相变铺平了道路。

title: Field-induced topological Hall effect and butterfly-shaped magnetoresistance in the centrosymmetric antiferromagnet EuAuAs
summary: The coupling between magnetic and electronic degrees of freedom gives rise to a variety of intriguing transport phenomena. Among them, the topological Hall effect, originating from the real-space Berry phase associated with nontrivial magnetic textures, has attracted considerable attention. Here, we systematically investigate the magnetic and transport properties of antiferromagnet EuAuAs. Magnetic characterizations reveal antiferromagnetic transition at 5.7 K and 6.3 K for $H \parallel ab$ and $H \parallel c$, accompanied by metamagnetic transition and small hysteresis for $H \parallel ab$. Electrical transport measurements reveal a pronounced topological Hall effct in the antiferromagnetic state with $H \parallel ab$ and $I \parallel c$, which may be attributed to finite scalar spin chirality. Furthermore, the magnetoresistance exhibits butterfly-shaped hysteresis and strong angular dependence, which are likely associated with spin-dependent electron scattering, magnetic-domain evolution, and domain-wall pinning. Our results suggest that field-induced spin textures play an important role in the magnetotransport properties and provide insights into the interplay between magnetic textures and electronic transport in centrosymmetric antiferromagnets.

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了反铁磁材料EuAuAs的磁性和输运性质，发现其在反铁磁态下存在明显的拓扑霍尔效应，归因于有限标量自旋手性，并观察到蝴蝶形磁电阻迟滞和强角度依赖性，揭示了场致自旋织构对磁输运的重要影响。
AI.motivation: 探索磁性与电子自由度耦合产生的拓扑霍尔效应，特别是在中心对称反铁磁材料中的实现机制，以理解磁织构与电子输运之间的相互作用。
AI.method: 对EuAuAs进行系统的磁化率表征和电输运测量，包括不同磁场方向（H∥ab和H∥c）下的磁性测量，以及H∥ab、I∥c条件下的拓扑霍尔效应、磁电阻及其角度依赖性分析。
AI.result: EuAuAs在5.7 K（H∥ab）和6.3 K（H∥c）发生反铁磁转变，H∥ab方向存在变磁转变和小迟滞；反铁磁态下观察到显著的拓扑霍尔效应；磁电阻呈现蝴蝶形迟滞和强角度依赖性。
AI.conclusion: 场致自旋织构在反铁磁体EuAuAs的磁输运性质中起重要作用，为中心对称反铁磁体中磁织构与电子输运的耦合机制提供了新见解。

title: Hall viscosity from metric-sensitive dichroic probes
summary: Hall viscosity characterizes the geometric response of a quantum Hall droplet to deformations of the underlying metric, yet it has remained difficult to measure directly. We propose a spectroscopic probe based on circular dichroism, using chiral metric-sensitive drives -- implemented as rotating quadrupolar ("saddle") perturbations -- that effectively modulate the metric and couple to the generators of area-preserving deformations. The resulting dichroic signal directly measures the Hall viscosity, while frequency-resolved spectroscopy disentangles it from other excitations. A local formulation further enables spatially resolved markers of Hall viscosity applicable to both continuum and lattice systems. Our results open a direct route to measuring Hall viscosity in quantum-engineered platforms such as cold atoms in optical lattices.

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用圆二色性光谱作为探针，通过手性度量敏感驱动（旋转四极扰动）直接测量量子霍尔液滴的霍尔粘度，并可在冷原子等量子工程平台中实现。
AI.motivation: 霍尔粘度是表征量子霍尔液滴对度量形变的几何响应的重要物理量，但长期以来难以直接实验测量。
AI.method: 提出基于圆二色性的光谱探针，利用手性度量敏感驱动（旋转四极"鞍点"扰动）有效调制度量，耦合面积保持形变生成元，通过频率分辨光谱将霍尔粘度与其他激发区分开。
AI.result: 二色信号直接测量霍尔粘度；频率分辨光谱可将其与其他激发解耦；局域公式提供适用于连续体和晶格系统的空间分辨标记。
AI.conclusion: 该方案为在冷原子光晶格等量子工程平台中直接测量霍尔粘度开辟了新路径。

title: Consistent transition model for Bi0.5Na0.5TiO3 from temperature-dependent structural and electrical properties
summary: BNT based solid solutions are promising parent materials for lead free dielectric capacitors, thanks to their high recoverable energy densities and breakdown strengths. However, the ambient temperature symmetry and high temperature phase evolution of BNT remain unclear. Crucially, structural transformations and electrical ordering are most often considered independently, hindering a coherent understanding of the BNT phase transition. In this work, we combine X ray diffraction, transmission electron microscopy, Raman spectroscopy, impedance spectroscopy, and high field polarization cycling to establish a unified picture of the structural and dielectric response of BNT. Based on these results, we propose a consistent transition model for BNT that reconciles previously conflicting interpretations. This integrated structure property study provides a rationale for developing high performance, lead free energy storage materials.

AI.tldr: 本文通过多技术联用，建立了BNT材料的统一结构-介电响应模型，解决了相变机制中结构与电学行为相互独立的矛盾，为开发无铅储能材料提供了依据。
AI.motivation: 环境温度下BNT的对称性及高温相演化尚不清楚，且结构转变与电学有序性常被独立研究，阻碍了对BNT相变的系统性理解。
AI.method: 结合X射线衍射、透射电镜、拉曼光谱、阻抗谱及高场极化循环等多种实验手段，建立BNT结构与介电响应的统一图像。
AI.result: 提出了一致性的BNT相变模型，调和了此前相互矛盾的多种解释。
AI.conclusion: 该综合的结构-性能研究为开发高性能无铅储能材料提供了理论基础。

title: Perfect elliptic dichroism: Probing the metric of anisotropic quantum Hall droplets
summary: Understanding the geometry of quantum Hall systems is a central challenge in modern condensed matter physics. We introduce a framework for probing the geometric structure of quantum Hall droplets by engineering the geometry of a dichroic probe and identifying the onset of "perfect elliptic dichroism", a regime in which the system responds exclusively to an elliptically polarized drive of a given chirality. This phenomenon provides a direct diagnostic of the droplet's intrinsic metric, and we show that it extends naturally to ideal Chern bands, where holomorphicity of the occupied states guarantees the vanishing of one chiral absorption rate with a quantized response for the other. In lattice realizations, such as the Harper-Hofstadter model, finite lattice-spacing corrections break the exact continuum metric description and give rise to a renormalized, emergent Landau-orbit metric; the probe ellipticity at which perfect dichroism is achieved then shifts accordingly, offering a direct spectroscopic window onto this lattice-induced geometric renormalization. Our results illuminate the rich geometric structure of quantum Hall phases and offer concrete pathways for observing these effects in quantum-engineered platforms.

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过设计双色探针的几何结构来探测量子霍尔液滴的几何性质，并识别"完美椭圆二色性"的阈值，从而直接诊断液滴的内禀度量。该现象自然地延伸到理想陈能带，并在晶格模型中展示了由有限晶格间距修正引起的朗道轨道度量重整化效应。
AI.motivation: 理解量子霍尔系统的几何结构是现代凝聚态物理的核心挑战，现有方法缺乏直接探测量子霍尔液滴内禀度量的有效手段。
AI.method: 通过工程化双色探针的几何结构，识别"完美椭圆二色性"的阈值，利用系统对特定椭圆极化驱动的选择性响应来诊断内禀度量。在Harper-Hofstadter等晶格模型中分析有限晶格间距修正导致的度量重整化。
AI.result: 发现完美椭圆二色性可直接诊断量子霍尔液滴的内禀度量；在理想陈能带中，全纯性保证一个手性吸收率消失而另一个具有量子化响应；晶格模型中探针椭圆率偏移反映了晶格诱导的几何重整化。
AI.conclusion: 研究揭示了量子霍尔相丰富的几何结构，并为在量子工程平台上观测这些效应提供了具体途径。

title: Analytical approximations of dispersion laws and ultra-complex conductivity diagrams
summary: We study the probability of the emergence of ultra-complex conductivity diagrams in conductors that satisfy the tight-binding approximation and have the simple or body-centered cubic lattice. The presence of ultra-complex conductivity diagrams allows us to observe a number of highly nontrivial effects in strong magnetic fields, however, the probability of their emergence in a given substance is quite low. In the case of the simple or body-centered cubic lattice, the leading tight-binding approximation does not allow us to estimate this probability due to the peculiarities of the spectra in this situation. To estimate this probability, we use higher-order corrections to the leading approximation, which yield more accurate analytical expressions for the electron spectra.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了满足紧束缚近似的简单立方或体心立方晶格导体中出现超复杂电导率图的概率。由于领先阶近似的谱特征，无法直接估算概率，因此采用高阶修正来获得更精确的电子谱解析表达式以进行估计。
AI.motivation: 超复杂电导率图可以在强磁场中观察到许多高度非平凡效应，但其在给定物质中出现的概率极低。为了评估这种概率，需要超越领先阶紧束缚近似。
AI.method: 使用高阶修正（超越领先阶紧束缚近似）来获得更精确的电子谱解析表达式，从而估算超复杂电导率图出现的概率。
AI.result: 在简单立方或体心立方晶格中，领先阶紧束缚近似由于谱的奇异性无法估计超复杂电导率图的出现概率；采用高阶修正后可以对此概率进行估算。
AI.conclusion: 对于简单立方或体心立方晶格，必须使用高阶紧束缚近似修正才能可靠估计超复杂电导率图的出现概率。

title: Anomalous Duffing mechanics of a suspended carbon nanotube quantum dot at ultrastrong coupling
summary: At cryogenic temperatures, suspended single-wall carbon nanotube quantum dots act both as prototypical quantum dots as well as high-quality factor mechanical resonators. Single-electron tunneling enables reaching an ultrastrong electron-vibron coupling regime, where the coupling parameter exceeds the vibration frequency. Due to the high quality factors, a strongly nonlinear Duffing response is easily reached. Here, we quantitatively study the Duffing response parameters of such a device and their relation to Coulomb blockade oscillation. At the edges of single-electron tunneling regions, a local increase of the Duffing parameter corresponding to a stiffening spring is observed. Size and approximate scaling of the effect agree with single-electron tunneling phenomena, which however should lead to softening spring behaviour. Possible causes of these puzzling results are discussed.

AI.tldr: 研究悬浮碳纳米管量子点中Duffing响应与库仑阻塞振荡的关系，发现在单电子隧穿区域边缘出现Duffing参数局部增大（刚度增强），与预期单电子隧穿导致的软化行为相反。
AI.motivation: 定量研究悬浮单壁碳纳米管量子点中Duffing响应参数与库仑阻塞振荡之间的关联，揭示电子-振动耦合的力学效应。
AI.method: 在低温下测量悬浮单壁碳纳米管量子点的Duffing响应参数，系统分析其与库仑阻塞振荡区域的关系。
AI.result: 在单电子隧穿区域边缘观察到Duffing参数局部增大（刚度硬化），该效应的幅度和标度关系与单电子隧穿现象一致，但预期应为软化弹簧行为。
AI.conclusion: 实验发现了与理论预期相反的刚度硬化现象，讨论了可能的原因，表明该系统中电子-振动耦合的力学效应存在未完全理解的新机制。

title: Phonon-driven Floquet-Bloch states probed by quantum beat spectroscopy
summary: Controlling material excitations offers access to novel fundamental and technological properties. The paradigm of Floquet engineering, the manipulation of the electronic structure using a coherent and time-periodic driving source, has attracted significant attention. While most realizations rely on strong optical fields, coherent phonons provide an alternative route to realizing Floquet-Bloch states, and are expected to enable substantially longer-lived Floquet-Bloch states. We show that laser-excited coherent phonons drive Floquet-Bloch states. Using time-resolved multiphoton photoemission combined with quantum beat spectroscopy on graphene-covered Ir(111), we track the coherent electronic dynamics of the image-potential states dressed by coherent phonons. The beat signal indicates the presence of sideband structure with the coherent-phonon frequency as its fundamental period, consistent with Floquet theory. Furthermore, an independent oscillation in intensity at the same frequency was observed, confirming excitation of the coherent phonon mode. Compared with conventional light-driven Floquet-Bloch states, the observed phonon-driven Floquet-Bloch states persist for one to two orders of magnitude longer. These results establish a time-domain route to identifying phonon-driven Floquet-Bloch states and reveal their formation on ultrafast timescales.

AI.tldr: 本文通过时间分辨多光子光电子发射和量子拍频光谱技术，在石墨烯覆盖的Ir(111)表面观测到了由激光激发的相干声子驱动的Floquet-Bloch态，并证明其寿命比传统光驱动Floquet-Bloch态长1-2个数量级。
AI.motivation: 传统Floquet工程依赖强光场驱动，但光驱动Floquet态寿命较短。相干声子作为一种替代方案，理论上可实现更长寿命的Floquet-Bloch态，然而实验上尚未被证实。
AI.method: 利用时间分辨多光子光电子发射（tr-mPPE）结合量子拍频光谱（quantum beat spectroscopy），在石墨烯/Ir(111)表面追踪相干声子修饰的镜像势态（image-potential states）中的电子相干动力学，通过拍频信号和独立强度振荡双重确认声子驱动Floquet边带结构。
AI.result: 观测到以相干声子频率为基本周期的边带结构（符合Floquet理论），并在相同频率下观察到独立的强度振荡，证实了相干声子模式的激发。与光驱动相比，声子驱动的Floquet-Bloch态寿命延长了1-2个数量级。
AI.conclusion: 建立了识别声子驱动Floquet-Bloch态的时间域方法，揭示了其在超快时间尺度上的形成机制，为利用声子实现长寿命Floquet工程提供了实验基础。

title: Rolling Two-Dimensional Collinear Magnets into Chiral Nanotubes with $p$-Wave Magnetism
summary: $p$-wave magnets are noncollinear compensated magnetic systems that exhibit nonrelativistic antisymmetric spin splitting in momentum space. Their odd-parity spin symmetry enables unconventional spintronic functionalities, including highly efficient charge-to-spin conversion via the Edelstein effect. An outstanding question is whether such magnetic phases can emerge from simple and broadly accessible magnetic building blocks rather than from intrinsically noncollinear magnetic orders. Here, we show that rolling two-dimensional collinear magnets -- ferromagnets, antiferromagnets, and altermagnets -- into nanotubes generates a rich spin-symmetry landscape controlled by curvature, chirality, and magnetic order. Remarkably, chiral nanotubes hosting radial or tangential coplanar spin textures generically realize $p$-wave magnetism irrespective of the underlying collinear parent phase. The emergent odd-parity spin symmetry manifests itself in both electronic and magnonic spectra through antisymmetric $p$-wave spin splitting. Our results establish magnetic nanotubes as a versatile platform for engineering unconventional $p$-wave magnetism and predict a nonrelativistic Edelstein response that exceeds conventional spin-orbit-driven charge-to-spin conversion by more than an order of magnitude.

AI.tldr: 本文提出将二维共线磁体（铁磁、反铁磁、交变磁体）卷曲成纳米管，可产生丰富的自旋对称性景观，实现p波磁性，其非相对论Edelstein效应比传统自旋轨道驱动的电荷-自旋转换效率高出一个数量级。
AI.motivation: 探索p波磁体能否从简单、广泛可得的磁性构建块（而非固有的非共线磁序）中产生，以及如何通过几何工程实现非常规p波磁性。
AI.method: 将二维共线磁体（铁磁、反铁磁、交变磁体）卷曲成纳米管，利用曲率、手性和磁序控制自旋对称性，通过电子和磁振子谱分析验证p波自旋分裂。
AI.result: 手性纳米管携带径向或切向共面自旋织构可实现p波磁性，与底层共线母相无关；电子和磁振子谱中均出现反对称p波自旋分裂；非相对论Edelstein响应比传统自旋轨道驱动的电荷-自旋转换高出一个数量级以上。
AI.conclusion: 磁性纳米管为工程化非常规p波磁性提供了多功能平台，可显著提升电荷-自旋转换效率。

title: A parsimonious structure model for the icosahedral quasicrystal Cd5.7Yb
comment: Accepted by Acta Cryst. A, June 22, 2026
summary: A compact structure model for the icosahedral phase Cd5.7Yb is presented. The model is based on a higher-dimensional description and a cut-and-projection procedure to generate the atom distribution in three-dimensional physical space. It strictly employs only spherical or elliptical occupation domains, ensuring a low number of parameters and low calculation cost. In the presented form the model has seven adjustable parameters. Despite its minimalistic setting, the model reproduces available experimental data, such as chemical composition, mass density and electron density distribution, as well as the cluster structure in physical space very well. Nevertheless, the approximation of the occupation domains by spheres and ellipses evidently implies limitations in accuracy and universality. The model can be adapted for the description of other Tsai-type icosahedral phases.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于高维描述和切割投影法的Cd5.7Yb二十面体相紧凑结构模型，该模型仅采用球形或椭球形占据域，参数少、计算成本低，虽能良好复现实验数据，但精度和普适性有限，可推广至其他Tsai型二十面体相。
AI.motivation: 现有二十面体相结构模型复杂、参数多、计算成本高，需要一种更简洁高效的结构描述方法。
AI.method: 基于高维描述和切割-投影程序，严格采用球形或椭球形占据域，仅使用7个可调参数构建紧凑模型。
AI.result: 模型成功复现了化学成分、质量密度、电子密度分布及物理空间中的团簇结构等实验数据。
AI.conclusion: 该模型以最小化设置实现了良好实验复现能力，但球形/椭球形近似导致精度和普适性受限；可适应于其他Tsai型二十面体相的描述。

title: Transport in extended Kitaev chain with time reversal symmetry breaking and long-range interaction
summary: We consider a junction consisting of an extended one-dimensional Kitaev chain which incorporates both time-reversal symmetry (TRS) breaking and long-range interaction, sandwiched between two metallic leads from two sides. In this hybrid device, we study electrical transport under voltage bias for varying strength of the TRS breaking phase. We compare the transport characteristics of long-range type Kitaev chain with that of the short-range Kitaev chain as the strength of the TRS breaking phase varies. We find that the TRS breaking modifies the density of states and localisation/delocalisation property of the eigenstates which in turn affect the transport characteristics. Moreover, we find that the impact of the TRS breaking is not identical for the long-range Kitaev chain and its short-range counterpart. Therefore, noticeable differences in the transport properties can be observed due to the interplay between the TRS breaking and the range of interaction.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了一维Kitaev链（含时间反演对称性破缺和长程相互作用）夹在金属引线之间的电子输运特性，发现TRS破缺对长程和短程Kitaev链的输运影响不同。
AI.motivation: 探究时间反演对称性（TRS）破缺与相互作用范围（长程vs短程）对Kitaev链电子输运特性的联合影响，揭示二者之间的耦合效应。
AI.method: 构建一维Kitaev链与两侧金属引线的结型器件，通过调节TRS破缺强度，对比长程与短程Kitaev链的态密度、本征态局域化性质及电压偏置下的电输运特性。
AI.result: TRS破缺改变了态密度和本征态局域/非局域性质，从而影响输运特性；且对长程与短程Kitaev链的影响不同，两者之间存在显著的输运差异。
AI.conclusion: TRS破缺与相互作用范围的协同效应导致长程与短程Kitaev链表现出现明显不同的输运行为，为调控拓扑量子器件输运特性提供了新视角。

title: Topological control of third-harmonic generation in a mesoscopic quantum ring with spiral dislocation
comment: 14 pages, 12 figures, 1 table. Comments are welcome
summary: We investigate the nonlinear optical response of a two-dimensional mesoscopic quantum ring subjected to a spiral dislocation, with emphasis on third-harmonic generation (THG). The topological defect is modeled through a torsion-induced deformation of space, which modifies the effective metric without introducing curvature. By combining the minimal-coupling prescription in curved space with a radial ring confinement and a perpendicular magnetic field, we derive the effective radial Schrödinger problem, obtain the bound states, and evaluate the nonlinear susceptibilities within the electric-dipole approximation. We show that the axial symmetry of the topologically deformed ring preserves the dipole selection rule $Δm=\pm 1$ and therefore suppresses second-harmonic generation, while THG remains allowed through multistep transition chains. The study is further expanded through three complementary analyses that can be implemented without changing the Hamiltonian: a dephasing-controlled study of spectral resolution, three-dimensional waterfall spectra showing the dependence on $β$ and $B$, and a channel-resolved decomposition of the THG amplitude. Together, these results establish the spiral dislocation as a robust geometric knob for tuning nonlinear optical activity in mesoscopic ring-shaped nanostructures.

AI.tldr: 本文研究螺旋位错对二维介观量子环中非线性光学响应的影响，重点分析三次谐波产生（THG），发现拓扑缺陷保持偶极选择定则从而抑制二次谐波但允许三次谐波，并展示了螺旋位错可作为调控非线性光学活动的几何工具。
AI.motivation: 探索拓扑缺陷（螺旋位错）如何影响介观量子环的非线性光学响应，特别是三次谐波产生的调控机制。
AI.method: 通过扭转诱导的空间变形模型化拓扑缺陷，在弯曲空间中采用最小耦合方案，结合径向环约束和垂直磁场，推导有效径向薛定谔问题并求解束缚态，在电偶极近似下评估非线性磁化率。
AI.result: 1) 拓扑变形环的轴对称性保持偶极选择定则 Δm=±1，抑制二次谐波产生（SHG），而三次谐波（THG）通过多步跃迁链保持允许；2) 通过去相位控制谱分辨率、三维瀑布谱展示对 β 和 B 的依赖、通道分辨的 THG 振幅分解三种互补分析进一步阐明了结果。
AI.conclusion: 螺旋位错是一种鲁棒的几何调控手段，可用于调节介观环状纳米结构中的非线性光学活性。

title: Ferroelastic domain wall motion and collective domain switching in RbSCN
summary: Low frequency (0.05 - 40 Hz) dynamic elastic measurements and resonant ultrasound spectroscopy measurements (100-600 kHz) of RbSCN have been performed in the temperature region of the order-disorder improper ferroelastic phase transition at T$_c \approx$ 435~K. Quite similar to KSCN, the low frequency data show - in addition to the intrinsic phase transition anomalies - superelastic softening in a- and b-directions, resulting from movements of ferroelastic domain walls under dynamic stress. However, in contrast to KSCN, a sudden discontinuous increase of Young's modulus appears in RbSCN at { T$^{\ast} < T_c $}, which is accompanied by a frequency dependent damping peak. This behaviour is reminiscent of a first order phase transition.\\ Heating RbSCN slightly above T$^{\ast}$, followed by subseqent cooling, removes all {signs of domain wall dynamics}. The results demonstrate, that the anomalies in RbSCN around $T^{\ast}$ result from collective domain switching events that are induced when the {temperature dependent critical pinning stress, $σ_c(T)$ falls below the applied external stress $σ$, implying that $T^{\ast}(σ=σ_c)$. This interpretation is supported by calculations of the temperature dependences of twin boundary widths $w$ and energies $F_w$, as well as the Peierls potential $V_0$ using a compressible pseudospin model, which leads to a critical pinning stress, $σ_c(T)$ that is in excellent agreement with experimental values of $T^{\ast}(σ_c)$. }

AI.tldr: 本文通过低频动态弹性测量和共振超声光谱测量，研究了RbSCN在有序-无序非本征铁弹相变温度附近的弹性行为。发现类似KSCN的超弹性软化现象，但在T*<Tc处出现杨氏模量的不连续跳变和频率依赖的阻尼峰，这归因于集体畴切换事件。加热后冷却可消除畴壁动力学迹象。通过可压缩赝自旋模型计算，证实临界钉扎应力σc(T)与实验值T*(σc)吻合良好。
AI.motivation: 研究RbSCN在铁弹相变温度附近异常的弹性行为，特别是理解在T*<Tc处出现的模量跳变和阻尼峰的物理机制，以及畴壁动力学行为。
AI.method: 采用低频(0.05-40 Hz)动态弹性测量和共振超声光谱(100-600 kHz)测量，并结合可压缩赝自旋模型计算孪晶边界宽度w、能量F_w和Peierls势V_0的温度依赖性。
AI.result: 发现RbSCN在Tc≈435K处存在有序-无序非本征铁弹相变，低频数据表现出超弹性软化；在T*<Tc处出现杨氏模量的不连续跳变和频率依赖阻尼峰；加热至T*以上再冷却可消除畴壁动力学迹象。
AI.conclusion: RbSCN在T*附近的异常行为源于集体畴切换事件，当温度依赖的临界钉扎应力σc(T)低于施加的外部应力σ时触发，即T*(σ=σc)。可压缩赝自旋模型计算结果与实验值吻合良好。

title: Heat rectification through a quantum two-level system
summary: We study heat rectification through a quantum two-level system asymmetrically coupled to two thermal baths, as described by the Ohmic spin-boson model. We evaluate the steady-state heat current using a tensor-network approach, which enables us to access the strongly correlated regime, and benchmark the results against analytical formulas in several limiting regimes, including the weak-coupling and incoherent-tunneling regimes. We identify a scaling regime where the studied system flows from an ultraviolet regime, at temperatures larger than the Kondo temperature, to an infrared regime, at temperatures lower than the Kondo temperature. By applying perturbation theory near the infrared fixed point, we find that the rectification ratio follows a universal power law. Our numerical results agree well with this analytical prediction. Our results provide a fundamental understanding of how dissipation-induced many-body physics affects heat transport.

AI.tldr: 本文通过张量网络方法研究量子二能级系统不对称耦合两个热浴的热整流现象，发现了从紫外到红外标度区间的流动行为，并证明整流比遵循普适幂律，揭示了耗散诱导多体物理对热输运的影响。
AI.motivation: 理解耗散诱导的多体效应对热整流的影响，特别是在强关联区域的热输运行为。
AI.method: 采用张量网络方法计算稳态热流，并结合微扰论分析红外固定点附近的整流比标度行为。
AI.result: 发现了从紫外（T>TK）到红外（T<TK）的标度流动，整流比在红外固定点附近遵循普适幂律，数值结果与理论预测吻合。
AI.conclusion: 本文为耗散诱导的多体物理如何影响热输运提供了基础性理解，揭示了热整流的普适标度行为。

title: Boron-assisted stabilization of low-resistivity mixed-valence Cu-O thin films prepared by reactive magnetron sputtering
summary: This study systematically investigated the influence of boron incorporation in Cu-O thin films and the effect of oxygen partial pressure ($p_{\rm ox}$) on the phase evolution, chemical bonding, and electrical characteristics of the prepared films. A phase transition from Cu$_2$O to Cu$_2$O/Cu$_4$O$_3$ to CuO was observed as oxygen partial pressure increased. Boron incorporation significantly broadened the stability window of the Cu$_2$O and Cu$_4$O$_3$ phases and delayed the transition to CuO at higher oxygen partial pressure. In the highly B-doped Cu-O films, Cu$_4$O$_3$ was stabilized even under oxygen-rich conditions along with the CuO phase, suggesting that boron significantly altered the oxidation pathway. The formation of B-O and possible B-O-Cu configurations altered the local oxygen chemistry and promoted mixed-valence copper oxide phases. Electrical measurements revealed that highly B-doped Cu-O films exhibited a delayed transition from a high-resistivity low-$p_{\rm ox}$ regime to a low-resistivity mixed-valence regime, ultimately reaching approximately 0.06 $Ω$ cm, among the lowest reported resistivities for a CuO-like material. These findings demonstrate that boron doping is an effective approach for tailoring the phase stability, defect chemistry, and electrical characteristics of Cu-O thin films for optoelectronic and photovoltaic applications.

AI.tldr: 本研究系统探讨了硼掺入对Cu-O薄膜的影响，发现硼掺杂能拓宽Cu₂O和Cu₄O₃相的稳定窗口、延迟向CuO的转变，并实现了约0.06 Ω·cm的低电阻率，为光电应用提供了新途径。
AI.motivation: 通过硼掺杂调控Cu-O薄膜的相稳定性、缺陷化学和电学特性，以满足光电器件和光伏应用的需求。
AI.method: 系统调控氧分压与硼掺杂浓度，研究Cu-O薄膜的相演变、化学键合和电学特性，使用XRD、XPS等表征手段分析相组成和化学状态。
AI.result: 氧分压升高导致相变：Cu₂O → Cu₂O/Cu₄O₃ → CuO；硼掺杂拓宽了Cu₂O和Cu₄O₃的稳定窗口，延迟CuO形成；高硼掺杂稳定了Cu₄O₃相；最优电阻率约0.06 Ω·cm，为CuO类材料最低值之一。
AI.conclusion: 硼掺杂是调控Cu-O薄膜相稳定性和电学特性的有效策略，有望用于光电器件和光伏应用。

title: Bayesian model comparison of type-I and type-II ultrafast demagnetization dynamics
summary: Ultrafast demagnetization dynamics are often phenomenologically classified into type-I and type-II responses according to their temporal evolution following femtosecond laser excitation. However, finite experimental temporal resolution and noise can substantially obscure the intrinsic dynamics and complicate this classification. In this work, we investigate the distinguishability of type-I and type-II demagnetization dynamics using Gaussian-convolved phenomenological models and Bayesian information criterion-based statistical model comparison. Synthetic datasets with varying temporal resolution and noise levels are first analyzed to evaluate the conditions under which the two classes can be reliably discriminated. We show that convolution with the instrumental response function significantly reduces the observable differences between the intrinsic responses, thereby producing broad regimes in which model discrimination becomes statistically inconclusive. The applicability of the framework is further demonstrated through analysis of representative experimental ultrafast demagnetization data from NiCo2O4 thin films. These results suggest that the apparent classification of ultrafast demagnetization dynamics can be highly sensitive to experimental resolution, noise level, and analysis methodology.

AI.tldr: 本文通过贝叶斯信息准则和高斯卷积模型，系统研究了实验时间分辨率和噪声水平对超快退磁动力学中type-I与type-II分类可区分性的影响，发现仪器响应函数会显著模糊两种类型之间的差异，导致分类结果高度依赖于实验条件与分析手段。
AI.motivation: 超快退磁动力学常被分为type-I和type-II两类，但实验的时间分辨率和噪声会掩盖内在动力学特征，使得这种分类变得不可靠。作者旨在量化这些因素对分类判定的影响。
AI.method: 采用高斯卷积的唯象模型生成合成数据集，结合贝叶斯信息准则（BIC）进行统计模型比较，分析不同时间分辨率和噪声水平下两类动力学的可区分性，并在NiCo2O4薄膜实验数据上进行验证。
AI.result: 仪器响应函数的卷积显著降低了type-I与type-II内在响应之间的可观测差异，导致在广泛参数区间内模型判别在统计上无定论；分类结果对实验分辨率、噪声和分析方法高度敏感。
AI.conclusion: 超快退磁动力学的表观分类并不绝对，受限于实验条件与分析框架，研究者需谨慎对待这种二元分类，并考虑有限时间分辨率和噪声带来的统计不确定性。

title: GaAs/AlAs Acoustic Nanocavities for Coherent GHz-THz Phonon Engineering
summary: The controlled confinement of high-frequency acoustic phonons in semiconductor nanostructures has emerged as a key ingredient for functional nanophononic and hybrid quantum technologies. In this Review, we summarize recent advances that have established GaAs/AlAs acoustic nanocavities as a versatile and scalable platform for GHz-THz phonon engineering. Compared with alternative nanophononic platforms, GaAs/AlAs offers a particularly favorable combination of mature epitaxial growth, strong photoelastic coupling, and simultaneous optical-acoustic mode colocalization across the GHz-THz regime. We focus on distributed Bragg reflector (DBR)-based architectures, with particular emphasis on micropillar resonators enabling three-dimensional phonon confinement and strong colocalization of acoustic and optical fields. Recent developments in ultrafast optical techniques, including picosecond ultrasonics and Brillouin scattering, have provided unprecedented access to phonon dynamics, coherence, and dissipation at the nanoscale. These advances, combined with strong optophononic coupling, have enabled efficient coherent generation, detection, and manipulation of confined acoustic modes. We discuss key performance metrics, integration strategies, and remaining challenges, notably in acousto-optic transduction efficiency and scalable electrical control. Finally, we outline near-term perspectives for nonlinear phononics, hybrid quantum systems, and integrated phononic circuits, positioning GaAs/AlAs heterostructures as a robust and scalable platform for next-generation nanophononic functionalities.

AI.tldr: 本文综述了基于GaAs/AlAs声学纳米腔的GHz-THz声子工程平台，重点介绍了分布式布拉格反射镜（DBR）微柱谐振器结构，该平台凭借成熟的异质外延生长、强光弹耦合以及光-声模式共局域化等优势，在纳米声子学和混合量子技术中展现出广阔前景。
AI.motivation: 实现高频声学声子在半导体纳米结构中的受控局域化，是发展功能化纳米声子学和混合量子技术的关键需求。需要一种兼具可扩展性、强耦合性能和宽频带操作能力的工程平台。
AI.method: 以GaAs/AlAs异质结构为核心，采用分布式布拉格反射镜（DBR）架构构建声学纳米腔，特别是微柱谐振器实现三维声子局域化；结合超快光学技术（皮秒超声学、布里渊散射）实现声子动力学的相干操控与检测。
AI.result: 实现了GHz-THz宽频段内声子的高效相干产生、检测与操控；展示了强光-声耦合效应；建立了关键性能指标（如声光转换效率）和集成策略。
AI.conclusion: GaAs/AlAs异质结构作为鲁棒且可扩展的平台，在非线性声子学、混合量子系统和集成声子电路等下一代纳米声子功能器件中具有重要前景，但仍需解决声光转换效率和可扩展电控等挑战。

title: Hidden Defect Chemistry in Ion-Irradiated MoS$_2$ Field-Effect Transistors Revealed by Photocurrent Loss
summary: Defect engineering in monolayer MoS$_2$ is a promising route to tune field-effect transistors (FETs), but the electronic response of defects in processed devices can be masked by contacts, substrate effects, adsorbates, and chemical passivation. Here, we irradiate MoS$_2$ FETs with low-energy 40~eV Ar$^+$ ions to preferentially create sulfur vacancies (V$_S$) in the channel while minimizing substrate damage. We compare dark and illuminated electrical characterization with surface analysis and first-principles calculations. Dark transfer characteristics show an apparent robustness against irradiation up to moderate fluences, with pronounced degradation only at the highest fluence. Under 532~nm illumination, however, the photocurrent and light-induced photodoping decrease systematically with increasing ion fluence, revealing irradiation-induced changes that are hidden in standard dark measurements. Atomic force microscopy and X-ray photoelectron spectroscopy show substantial carbon-containing residues on processed devices even after extended cleaning. We propose that such residues may provide a reservoir for hydrocarbon-mediated passivation of sulfur vacancies. Density-functional-theory calculations provide a microscopic model consistent with this scenario: unsaturated V$_S$ introduce in-gap states, H-C$_S$ configurations suppress these states, and carbon substitution without hydrogen leaves defect states in the band gap. Our results highlight carbon-containing surface contamination as a key factor in interpreting defect engineering experiments on MoS$_2$ and related TMDC devices.

AI.tldr: 本文通过低能Ar⁺离子辐照在MoS₂ FET中引入硫空位，发现暗态下器件表现稳健，但光电流和光掺杂随辐照剂量系统下降。实验与DFT计算表明，碳氢表面残留物可钝化硫空位，掩盖缺陷的电子效应，对缺陷工程实验提出重要警示。
AI.motivation: 缺陷工程是调控MoS₂ FET性能的 promising 方法，但接触、衬底、吸附物和化学钝化等效应可能掩盖缺陷的真实电子响应，因此需要系统区分这些因素。
AI.method: 对MoS₂ FET进行40 eV Ar⁺低能辐照优先产生硫空位（V_S），结合暗态与光照下的电学表征、原子力显微镜（AFM）、X射线光电子能谱（XPS）以及第一性原理DFT计算进行综合分析。
AI.result: 1) 暗态下器件对中低剂量辐照表现稳健，仅在高剂量下明显退化；2) 532 nm光照下，光电流和光掺杂随辐照剂量系统下降，揭示暗态隐藏的缺陷效应；3) AFM和XPS发现器件表面存在大量含碳残留物；4) DFT计算表明：未钝化的V_S引入带隙态，H-C_S构型可抑制这些态，而无氢碳取代仍留下缺陷态。
AI.conclusion: 碳氢表面残留物可作为硫空位的钝化源，掩盖辐照诱导的缺陷效应。这一发现对MoS₂及TMDC器件的缺陷工程实验具有重要指导意义。

title: Microfabricated Au and Au/graphene bilayer platelets for levitation experiments
summary: We describe a fabrication process for preparing liquid suspensions of micron-scale Au and Au/graphene bilayer platelets using thin-film deposition, optical lithography, ion milling, hydrofluoric acid (HF) substrate etching, and release from the substrate into a liquid suspension. Residual HF is removed through repeated centrifugation, decanting, and dilution cycles. The resulting suspension is characterized by electrospray deposition onto a secondary substrate, followed by electron and atomic force microscopy. The deposited platelets exhibit minimal aggregation, and the overall platelet yield reaches up to 30% of the platelets originally patterned on the wafer. Lateral force microscopy further confirms that the Au/graphene bilayer remains intact throughout fabrication, release, and electrospray deposition. This process provides a practical route for preparing high-quality platelet suspensions for levitated nanoparticle experiments and other applications requiring suspensions of two-dimensional nanostructures.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一种制备微米级Au和Au/石墨烯双层片状悬浮液的工艺，涉及薄膜沉积、光刻、离子铣、HF刻蚀及离心纯化等步骤，最终获得低聚集、高产率（达30%）的片状悬浮液，并验证了双层结构的完整性。
AI.motivation: 为悬浮纳米颗粒实验及其他需要二维纳米结构悬浮液的应用提供一种实用的、高质量的片状悬浮液制备方法。
AI.method: 通过薄膜沉积、光学光刻、离子铣、HF基底刻蚀将片状结构从基底释放到液体中，再利用重复离心、倾析和稀释循环去除残留HF，最后通过电喷雾沉积进行表征。
AI.result: 沉积的片状聚集极少，片状产率高达最初图案化片的30%；横向力显微镜确认Au/石墨烯双层结构在制备、释放和电喷雾沉积过程中保持完整。
AI.conclusion: 该工艺为制备高质量片状悬浮液提供了一条实用路线，适用于悬浮纳米颗粒实验及其他需要二维纳米结构悬浮液的应用。

title: Mechanical Manipulation of Graphene Auto-Kirigami with an AFM tip
comment: Main text: 12 pages, 6 figures. Supplement: 6 pages, 5 figures
summary: Graphene auto-kirigami describes the thermodynamically self-driven tearing, sliding and folding of graphene sheets to form micrometre-scale, folded ribbons. However, this process typically requires specialised multi-axial nanoindentation systems or highly laborious AFM-based scratching methods. We here introduce a novel, scalable, wholly AFM-based method to nucleate high yields of ribbons in comparable timeframes to previous multi-axial indentation methods, by AFM-based indentation and "hard tapping", whereby high setpoint AFM imaging can nucleate, manipulate and dynamically image the auto-kirigami ribbons. This can be performed with any conventional AFM, enabling extensional growth, rotation and reversal of ribbons towards potential applications as NEMS devices.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于AFM的"硬敲击"方法，通过压痕和高设定点成像，可规模化、高效地制备石墨烯自动折纸纳米带，并实现其操控与动态成像。
AI.motivation: 现有石墨烯自动折纸工艺依赖多轴纳米压痕系统或繁琐的AFM刮擦方法，缺乏可规模化、简便高效的制备手段。
AI.method: 采用AFM压痕结合"硬敲击"（高设定点AFM成像），在常规AFM上实现自动折纸纳米带的成核、扩展、旋转和反转。
AI.result: 该方法可在与传统多轴压痕法相当的时间范围内，实现高产率纳米带的制备，并支持纳米带的延伸生长、旋转和逆向操控。
AI.conclusion: 该AFM基方法为石墨烯自动折纸纳米带的规模化制备与操控提供了简便、通用的新途径，有望推动其在NEMS器件中的应用。

title: Synthesizability and Mechanical Properties of High-Entropy Borides: First-Principles and Machine Learning Studies
summary: We perform density functional theory (DFT) calculations to investigate five-metal high-entropy borides (HEBs) in the hexagonal AlB$_2$ structure, considering all 126 possible elemental combinations among the nine group 4-6 transition metals (Ti, V, Cr, Zr, Nb, Mo, Hf, Ta, and W). The entropy forming ability (EFA) descriptor is employed to evaluate their single-phase synthesizability, and the resulting EFA predictions show good agreement with the experimental data for selected HEBs. Mechanical properties are computed using special quasi-random structures. Several mechanically unstable compounds -- primarily those containing Cr -- are also predicted to be less synthesizable. Machine learning (ML) models are developed to analyze the results. This combined ab initio and ML study provides a systematic roadmap for identifying mechanically superior single-phase HEBs.

AI.tldr: 本文通过密度泛函理论计算和机器学习，系统研究了126种五金属高熵硼化物（AlB₂结构）的力学性能和单相可合成性，发现含Cr的化合物力学不稳定且不易合成，为识别高性能单相高熵硼化物提供了系统路线图。
AI.motivation: 寻找具有优异力学性能且能稳定合成单相的五金属高熵硼化物（HEBs），解决传统试错法效率低下的问题。
AI.method: 使用DFT计算126种元素组合（Ti, V, Cr, Zr, Nb, Mo, Hf, Ta, W）；采用熵形成能力（EFA）描述符评估单相可合成性；利用特殊准随机结构计算力学性能；开发机器学习模型分析数据。
AI.result: EFA预测与实验数据吻合良好；含Cr的化合物力学不稳定且可合成性较低；机器学习模型有效辅助分析。
AI.conclusion: 结合第一性原理计算和机器学习，为识别力学性能优越的单相高熵硼化物提供了系统化的路线图。

title: Excitons in Large Disordered Boron-Nitride Layer using Linear-Scaling Bethe-Salpeter Simulations
summary: We introduce a real-space, linear-scaling Bethe-Salpeter framework that enables excitonic spectroscopy in large and possibly disordered boron-nitride-derived systems. Thanks to the use of a sublattice-resolved perturbative decoupling that maps localized electron-hole pairs onto a sparse tight-binding model, we implement the Kernel Polynomial Method to compute absorption spectra with O(N) cost. To illustrate the capabilities of our method, we apply it to Anderson-disordered monolayer hexagonal boron nitride with up to $10^{5}$ orbitals. The method reveals a disorder-induced asymmetric broadening of bright excitons, a crossover from quadratic to linear redshift of the main absorption peak, and Anderson localization of the exciton center of mass. This approach extends excitonic calculations beyond the reach of conventional ab initio Green's function methods (GW approximation and Bethe-Salpeter equation), opening optical spectroscopy to large-scale, disordered, moiré, quasicrystalline, and structurally complex quantum materials.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种实空间、线性标度的Bethe-Salpeter框架，通过亚晶格分辨的微扰退耦方法将局域电子-空穴对映射到稀疏紧束缚模型，结合核多项式方法实现O(N)计算复杂度的吸收谱计算，成功应用于含多达10^5个轨道的安德森无序单层六方氮化硼，揭示了无序诱导的亮激子不对称展宽、主吸收峰从二次到线性的红移交叉以及激子质心的安德森局域化。
AI.motivation: 传统基于GW近似和Bethe-Salpeter方程的第一性原理方法在处理大尺度、无序、莫尔超晶格、准晶及结构复杂量子材料时计算代价过高，难以胜任。作者旨在开发一种能超越这些限制的线性标度方法，使激子光谱学能够应用于上述复杂体系。
AI.method: 采用实空间框架，通过亚晶格分辨的微扰退耦将局域电子-空穴对映射到稀疏紧束缚模型，并利用核多项式方法(Kernel Polynomial Method)实现O(N)线性标度的吸收谱计算。
AI.result: 成功应用于含10^5个轨道的安德森无序单层六方氮化硼，观察到：(1) 无序诱导的亮激子不对称展宽；(2) 主吸收峰从二次到线性的红移交叉；(3) 激子质心的安德森局域化。
AI.conclusion: 该方法将激子计算的适用范围拓展到传统GW-BSE方法无法触及的大尺度无序、莫尔、准晶及结构复杂量子材料，为这些体系的光学光谱学打开了新的研究途径。
